subject: “Flop for Donald Trump won't silence election deniers for long”

In November, we defeated election deniers across the nation - from Arizona to Michigan.
But make no mistake, Team: the fight isn’t over. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-dec22?refcode=EM_FR_121422_B2_ELECTION-DENIERS_30AC&amount=5] Election deniers are already scheming to carry the big lie to the 2024 election. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-dec22?refcode=EM_FR_121422_B2_ELECTION-DENIERS_30AC&amount=5]
Their goal? Overturning elections that don’t go their way. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-dec22?refcode=EM_FR_121422_B2_ELECTION-DENIERS_30AC&amount=5]
The only defense against the far-right’s attacks on our democracy is electing and reelecting Democratic Secretaries of State across the country.
That’s why we’re starting early and laying the groundwork for the next election - but we can ONLY do this with the support of grassroots Democrats like you! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dasspac-dec22?refcode=EM_FR_121422_B2_ELECTION-DENIERS_30AC&amount=5]

name: MTG
subject: How we reclaim and win Georgia again (long email, please read when you have a few minutes)
body:
You’re going to want to hear what I have to say, it’s the only way we’ll ever win another national election.

Friend,

I'm reaching out today with a bit of a longer email, and I hope you'll take the time to read my thoughts on the future of the Republican Party and the roadmap to winning in states like Georgia again.

The media would have you believe that the Republican Party got crushed in the midterm elections, but they are lying to you in an effort to demoralize conservatives and avoid covering the impending investigations into Biden's impeachable offenses.

**I'm not taking the bait.** Instead I'm focusing on two things, holding the Biden Administration accountable as a member of the House Oversight Committee and positioning our party to win in 2024.

The electoral landscape has changed as a result of the rules Democrats unconstitutionally rammed through during COVID, and **[The Left has adapted far better than Republicans](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdkE9PrTAQxT9N2UHoFNrHgoV61ZXRjSbvbUhpB261f0gpMXx7e3lXFyZNk_5OZ87MwZ5yQWsOXPBC9w1IOqnC9FADUKBtXde0ERUXSk1MiakVTKCipKnRSWOrKSKms_EfGHV-75UKrjj32FHFOJN0bOjI27brRtpQrkG1igH9U9j-nNKyEnZD4CGfFdUWsfo0PqK-NMnMyfgeosFyziYeyynEUgWfX-ua5YjKSuNKCmGJhD1syQ1r2KJCwk5T0gT4BTnUZnMZHQNfoZJukWb2GR97svLbLMndhvjfcdDBy2SCH1yaf2qG3zsPM-YKI4cxhszkjMM1vubbLviEPmU3r2zZ_W1akV6e4inLg7dGZ-EXPBudwzndjuFu7_69FLHXy6ex1qxc5PDnI_xL1nkoa6a9J-KWABxlAEessCX2Jl9fn-JeNvfP5WP7BvNFhLt8p33Bn5_XJtU1IiDi9AWZNq3q).** Democrats understand that the election system they have built is no longer about voters, it's about ballots... [](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdkEFv3CAQhX8NvtkyAwvNwYdutkkUqWoOTQ69WCwMNokBC2NF_vdh3U0OkRAS32PmzTzsqJC0FSCkqEzHQVGrK9dBC0CBHtq2pVw2QmptmZb2IJlETQlv0Ss3NTYh5tGFN0ymvLdGR1-NnUH-g0nBDTWMc8PoAS2zKCzIG6rFuZq6Med5IewngbtyFtRrwubdhYTm0qQwr9JrTA7roZgErG1MtY6hvJalyAn1pJyvKcQ5EXa3Zt8vcU0aCTvZbAiIC_Jo3OoL2ge-Qq38rNwQCt73ZPWnWVbbFNN_x97EoLKLofd5-Krpv-_cD1gqnOrPKRamBuyv8fFPuxgyhlzcgp5q_fr3QTya48iK3IfJmSJ8g6MzJZzT8Rxvt5t_T1XqzPzupsktQpbwhz38S9ZlqMnZrSPySAD2MoA9Vlgze1HPz7_TVvNff-r7wwsMFxFuy523Gb9-Xps014iAyNMH6Yiu8Q) ... And the only way we'll ever get back to **paper ballots on Election DAY** (Not Election MONTH) is by beating them in 2024.

As you know, we've suffered some heartbreaking losses in Georgia over the past two election cycles, and if we're going to reclaim our advantage in Georgia, we must make some changes.

Democrats have waged war on our elections, and if we're going to win again, we must meet them where they are fighting.

**When they ballot harvest, we must ballot harvest.**

**When they vote early, we must vote early.**

**When they vote by mail, we must vote by mail.**

**_When they litigate, we must litigate._**

**[This requires an entire rethinking and restructuring of our campaign operation in Georgia, and it must start now](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdUD1P7DAQ_DVOlyhe-2JSpOC4B69B0EBBEzn2Juf3_BE5jk759_jCQYFkWdqZnZ3dwY42gtYNNKIpdMdB0lEVpoMagAI91HVNuagaodTIlBgPgglUlPAanTS2GiNiOhv_H6PO9Vap4IpzJ4bc1bZccBDDnRgGTjko5G07UjoIVtjunNK8EHZP4DG_BdUasboYH1Ffh2TMyfgvRIPllE08lmOIpQo-V8uS6YjKSuNKCmGOhD2uyfVLWKNCwk5j0gSaK-RQm9VlaF_4BirpZmkmn-H9TlZ-myW52RC_HHsdvEwm-N6l6UfT_765nzArjOyHGDImJ-xv8fFvu-AT-pTdvLLlemxX9vR3utxluvfW6Ez8As9G53BOxyE8bO3HaxE7PV-MtWZpRA5_2sO_Zp2XsmbcOiKOBGCXAeyxwprYu3x7e45byf-8lE-Hd5iuJDzkP20z_nTehlS3iICI0ydrHK6-).**

You may be wondering why we must start now, the next election is 2 years away. I'll tell you why, because the Democrats in Georgia are already working and winning the 2024 election for Joe Biden.

We must match their investment and execute a superior strategy, amd it is the only way we will win.

I know you're probably tired of receiving fundraising emails from Republicans, especially ones who end up losing. This email isn't about losing, and I don't even consider it fundraising. **[I'm asking you to make an investment in my effort to flip Georgia red and deliver the 16 electoral college votes to President Trump in 2024](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdkE1P5DAMhn9NemuVuJ0EDj0As-wBoV0JgbR7qdLE6WQ3HyVNhfrvyZSBA1JkyY9jv_aLPeOCUQ5c8Er3HUhmVGV7oAAM2IFSyjrRcKGUaZUwB9EKVIx0FL20rjEJMZ9s-I9Jl3xrVPTVqTeUgjJX9IAjQzYKxSkdr4Bhp7pxFG3l-lPO80LaGwL35S2o1oTNmw0J9XlIYV6mfzFZrKciErA2MdUqhpItSyknVE5aXzOIcyLt_Zr9sMQ1KSTt0WRNgJ-RR21XX9C-8AUq6Wdpp1Dwfmdbf4plubmYPhQHHYPMNobB5-mrZ_h-8zBh6bByGFMsTE44XOzrPuViyBhyUQvK1cenhz8TvPrXcjsfgrO6FL7Bk9XFnOPtGO-267-_q9Tr-c06ZxcuivnTbv7Z67KUs2bribglAHsbwG4rrLl9kc_Pj2mrux-_6p-HF5jORbgrMW8zfv28DGkuFgERx3dBg69x).** [](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdkMtu5CAQRb8G72xBQZvOwosknZ7VvBbJYjYWhrKbDA8LY7X890N7OllEQkicS9WtutixVjLaQivbynQCFBt1ZTugAAzYgVLKhGxaqfXItRwPkkvUjAiKXlnXjAkxX2z4i8mU99bo6KtLaapaQHGUCgzyh6OA4Ug5FWIQjFN-qFx3yXleCH8kcC5nQb0mbK42JDS3JoV5ld5jslhPxSRgPcZU6xjKa1mKnFA7ZX3NIM6J8POafb_ENWkk_DRmQ6C9IY_Grr6gfeA71MrPyk6h4H1PXn-YZbW5mP479iYGlW0Mvc_TZ03_ded-wlJhVT-kWJiasL_HJz7sYsgYcnEL2tW_T8OPrM9hvha5D86aInyBF2tKOKenIT5vD39-Vakz89U6Z5dWlvCnPfxb1mUoZ8etI_KJAOxlAHussGb-pl5fv6etFi8_62-HN5huIjyXO28zfv68N2nuEQGRp3_R7q8D) I know how to win and turn out voters in Georgia, I've done it twice in my district, and I'm going to do it again in 2024, but I need to keep my campaign fully staffed and expand our operation to reach voters who stayed home in 2020 and 2022.

Over the course of the next year we're going to be investing heavily in data, focused very heavily on early voters and mail voters. We just can't afford to go into Election Day with less early and mail votes than the Democrats. It's a recipe for disaster and disappointment.

**[That's why I'm asking you to invest early in our effort to beat the Democrats at their new game](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdkEFv4yAQhX8NvtmCwTbywYdt0_ZUtaqUSt2LRWBwaA1YGCvyv1_iTXuohJD4HjNv5mHPWsFoC61oC93XIJlRhe2BAjBgDaWU1aJqhVKGK2EawQUqRmqKTtqpMhExna3_wqjze6tUcMW5Vx0zXdcgpQ0HLZQQjNWKC9qY5iTrUzH155TmhfA_BB7zWVCtEauL9RH1tUlmTsbPEC2WYzbxWJoQSxV8fi1LliOqSVpXMghzJPxxTW5YwhoVEn4wSRNor8ihtqvLaB_4BpV0s7Sjz3jfk5ffZkluU4j_HQcdvEw2-MGl8adm-L3zMGKusHI4xZCZHHG4xVd_2wWf0Kfs5tVU1p-X49vHsfuYszz4yeos_IJnq3M4h7tTuN-6v69F7PV8sdNkl1bk8Mc9_GvWeajJmq0n4o4A7GUAe6ywJv4uj8fnuJX1w0v51LzDeBXhPt9pm_Hn561JdYsIiDj8A3zerwk).**

Because of this, we're collecting as many emergency donations in the next 3 HOURS to help JD hit his VITAL MID-MONTH FUNDRAISING GOAL and stand up to his WOKE ADVERSARIES. | Thank you so much for acting. Team Vance Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author. Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans. Ohio needs JD Vance. A blowout. A shellacking. A red tsunami.

A lot of pundits seemed pretty sure about how this year's midterm elections were supposed to go for Democrats and declared things to be a disaster well before polls closed — **but through our hard work, we proved them wrong.**

Democrats _expanded_ their majority in the Senate. We gained governorships. We flipped four state legislative chambers from red to blue. We kept our House losses to a minimum, protecting many of our most vulnerable incumbents and leaving us in a strong position to retake the chamber in 2024.

**It's going to be a seat-by-seat fight for the majority next cycle, and after I had my closest race ever, I fully expect Republicans to make early investments in VA-10.** [**Can you help me prepare for another tough fight by pitching in $10 or more now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55975311/383443119/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_221213EOC_N_JW_FULL_9_NG_N_L1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDFmZGE3ZS0wZDdjLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xgFDrI7h1nRK9PlfWBtWeX1XIFfGAKSjNfTZ5YnGgpc=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | **[$10 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55975312/383443120/-772585877?express_lane=true&refcode=EM_FR_221213EOC_N_JW_FULL_9_NG_N_EB10&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDFmZGE3ZS0wZDdjLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xgFDrI7h1nRK9PlfWBtWeX1XIFfGAKSjNfTZ5YnGgpc=)**

---
Democrats massively outperformed expectations and historical trends because we had a real record of results to run on. We passed historic economic relief that helped millions who had struggled during the heights of the pandemic. We expanded infrastructure. We passed the first climate bill in a generation. And we made it easier for folks to afford life-saving prescription drugs.

While it's disappointing that we won't have a House majority for the next two years to further build upon these successes, it's clear that the American people valued our policy agenda over the extremism of the GOP. **Republicans who aligned themselves with election deniers lost across the board, and voters consistently lifted up proud pro-choice Democrats in the first midterm since _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned.**

So I'm ready to keep fighting for our values. I'll continue to champion the policies that strengthen the middle class, protect our environment, create jobs, and expand opportunity. I'll be a voice for women, LGBTQ+ folks, and anyone whose rights are threatened by today's far right. And I'll _always_ defend the tenets of our democracy that allow for free and fair elections.

I know that my principles will make me a GOP target yet again. And we saw this past cycle just how fast a district like VA-10 can shift from appearing safe, to looking like a tossup. So I’m already starting to lay the groundwork for a robust campaign operation.

[**That's why I'm asking for your support today so we can hit the ground running next year. Please, will you donate to fund our initial 2023 outreach to voters?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55975318/383443126/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_221213EOC_N_JW_FULL_9_NG_N_L1&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDFmZGE3ZS0wZDdjLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xgFDrI7h1nRK9PlfWBtWeX1XIFfGAKSjNfTZ5YnGgpc=)

Thank you so much,

Jennifer

**Rep. Jennifer Wexton proudly serves the 10th District of Virginia. She's fighting to create a strong economy, ensure equality for all, and invest in a better future for America.** ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/55975319/383443127/-772585877?refcode=EM_FR_221213EOC_N_JW_FULL_9_NG_N_Biobox&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDFmZGE3ZS0wZDdjLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xgFDrI7h1nRK9PlfWBtWeX1XIFfGAKSjNfTZ5YnGgpc=)****

name: A.G. Holder Alert
subject: “it’s clear”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President
body:
we’ve been playing the long game – and it’s paying off
|
---

| **Team, for the past seven years, the NDRC has been playing the long game to defend our democracy._Thanks to this grassroots team, our hard work is paying off._

Your support has helped us build the fair maps movement that paved the way for Democratic victories this November. Can we count on you to continue powering our movement so we can help Democrats win in 2024, 2026, 2028, and beyond?**
| [PITCH IN NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55975478/383449398/2067580287?amount=30&refcode=20221214.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNhYjI0ODk5LTBmN2MtZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dskEQsPbG9Y9_ZtOChLFQJSchEnTrKuK-xmbZiGxEuo=)
---
When we started our work in 2016, we knew we were in for a _long_ fight. But this grassroots team has been there every step of the way, helping the NDRC defend our democracy by working to end gerrymandering and fight for fair maps.

**Now, we’re seeing the results of those efforts:**
“It’s clear that the NDRC’s comprehensive strategy played a key role to lay the foundation for [this November’s] outcome. Both on the federal and the state level, **fair maps in states like Pennsylvania, Michigan, and North Carolina prevented an unearned Republican wave**.” — A.G. Eric H. Holder, Jr.
---
[HELP THE NDRC CONTINUE FIGHTING FOR FAIR MAPS](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55975479/383449400/2067580287?amount=30&refcode=20221214.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNhYjI0ODk5LTBmN2MtZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dskEQsPbG9Y9_ZtOChLFQJSchEnTrKuK-xmbZiGxEuo=)
---
**A.G. Holder is right:** Thanks to your support, we beat the odds and defied history by making sure Democrats could compete fairly across the country. Together, our work helped elect _dozens_ of Democracy Defenders to positions like governor, secretary of state, state legislator, and more.
**Now, it’s time to keep it going.**
[**_With lawsuits pending in court, judicial elections on the horizon, and Republicans vowing to _continue_ fighting to manipulate maps, there’s no time for us to pull back or slow down. Will you pitch in now to help us continue our democracy-saving work?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/55975480/383449401/2067580287?amount=30&refcode=20221214.1r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNhYjI0ODk5LTBmN2MtZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dskEQsPbG9Y9_ZtOChLFQJSchEnTrKuK-xmbZiGxEuo=)

clean_body: we’ve been playing the long game – and it’s paying off | | Team, for the past seven years, the NDRC has been playing the long game to defend our democracy.Thanks to this grassroots team, our hard work is paying off. Your support has helped us build the fair maps movement that paved the way for Democratic victories this November. Can we count on you to continue powering our movement so we can help Democrats win in 2024, 2026, 2028, and beyond? | = When we started our work in 2016, we knew we were in for a long fight. But this grassroots team has been there every step of the way, helping the NDRC defend our democracy by working to end gerrymandering and fight for fair maps. Now, we’re seeing the results of those efforts: “It’s clear that the NDRC’s comprehensive strategy played a key role to lay the foundation for [this November’s] outcome. Both on the federal and the state level, fair maps in states like Pennsylvania, Michigan, and North Carolina prevented an unearned Republican wave.” — A.G. Eric H. Holder, Jr. = A.G. Holder is right: Thanks to your support, we beat the odds and defied history by making sure Democrats could compete fairly across the country. Together, our work helped elect dozens of Democracy Defenders to positions like governor, secretary of state, state legislator, and more. Now, it’s time to keep it going. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = This grassroots team has never let us down, so we know we can count on you. – The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 700 13th Street NW, Suite 600 Washington, DC 20005 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

I will keep working for YOU. As the 2024 Election rapidly approaches, I URGENTLY need a brave Patriot like YOU on my side. Remember, this will not be MY campaign --this will be OUR campaign. Because the only force strong enough to defeat the massive corruption we are up against is YOU, the AMERICAN PEOPLE. Friend, out of my MILLIONS of supportive Patriots, I've always trusted your opinion the most, so I would really like to hear what YOU think. Your answer is CRUCIAL, so I will look for your response in 5 MINUTES. Thank you, Donald J. Trump Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024 and Save America.

name: Sen. Rick Scott
subject: We’re done compromising
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---
For too long, politicians in Washington have taken the easy way out.

They’ve compromised with the radical Left and watered-down their conservative agenda to the point that it starts to look like a Democrat wishlist.

**_We say ENOUGH._ **

There’s a new generation of conservatives in Washington, and we’re ready to stand up for the ideas we campaigned on to get here - but we can’t do it alone.

clean_body: We knew something was up. We knew something was up. | FLASHBACK The Night Before The Botched Election We were ready for a fair fight, but we were already concerned. "We're so ready for fair elections, aren't we? And yet I know, like many of you & especially me, I'm worried about tomorrow. Who's worried about tomorrow?" -Kari lake We had no idea thousands would be turned away at the polls. It was worse than we could have ever imagined. Team Lake has filed one of the most momentous election lawsuits in history, and it’s only a matter of time before this corrupt system comes crashing down on itself. We NEED your help. This team has to keep fighting until our questions are answered. The Establishment wants to play the waiting game — and we need to be ready for the long haul. | Best, Team Lake Paid for by Save Arizona Fund Inc.

name: American Update
subject: Unlock the Federalist Papers
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0281%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=TwN1Tnhi8D%2bgl4O2wXU2eA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43784%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MMw6yz7JjbU%2b1mmIbaHHCg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** --not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43795%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1F6Re2dBDuCB10anyR04Hg&sysid=1) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43796%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DR%2f5e6nQ%2fopu3dAyzT20sA&sysid=1) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0281%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=TwN1Tnhi8D%2bgl4O2wXU2eA&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0281%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=TwN1Tnhi8D%2bgl4O2wXU2eA&sysid=1)

name: American Defense News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zp2pv58r0sb114mh729h1dj3812hn3vo8p83eck0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chg64o30cth2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2znet0pe5otltgbkuplaiks4dtuamjvv53cajp0t8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chg64o30cth2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvneaf0he039u6r35bpp1e7v7j8ac0k0tlq9rpao_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chg64o30cth2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

clean_body: A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;” Reaching over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. name: Your America
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7527%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=g28v03QNWQ05fTreqUFhjw&sysid=1)

| | | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97700%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DTqGFMch6KXX5VMY4bP4rg&sysid=1)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life’s most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That’s why we produced “[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97701%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5%2bm6xKi3xIoePCfnHFIJQg&sysid=1)” which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97702%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MCLiqeC2g1PnnekXvu%2bgXg&sysid=1)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis’s profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis’s The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis’s Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis’s beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis’s own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That’s why I hope you’ll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97703%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KLcN7D9B0a2ZBAAIfb1wDg&sysid=1).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023?
body:
As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi5p41ns5l4dnqe7g2sm7kmiqbahkhgve89lv2lg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chg69oj2chh2bs)
---
Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That’s why I’ve written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we’ll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* From January to February, we’ll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we’ll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we’ll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we’ll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---

I want to help | | | Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That’s why I’ve written the brand-new 2023 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we’ll be studying together if you choose to follow along: From January to February, we’ll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews. From March through May, we’ll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham. In the summer, we’ll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently. And in the fall and winter, we’ll meditate together on the parables of Jesus! | | | The Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. name: Mary Trump
subject: Will you help me defend democracy?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
Team —
On January 6, 2021, the very existence of our democracy was threatened and, for the first time in American history, the peaceful transition of power was interrupted.
The insurrectionists have not been defeated. The attempted coup on that day may have failed, but its architects have been emboldened and they are, in fact, planning the next one.
Today, we’re going to start fighting back. The Democracy Defense Fund is an organization committed to saving our country from the authoritarian traitors who seek to destroy it — but we need your help.
Will you join our pro-democracy movement by splitting a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton, team? Any amount helps in our fight to save democracy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
You know my uncle. He started the “Big Lie” and he continues to traffic in the right-wing extremism that puts our country at risk.
We must stop him and his loyal cronies and those, at all levels of government, who continue to undermine our democracy. That’s why I founded the Democracy Defense Fund — and it’s why Seth Moulton and I are asking for your help now.
We need resources to support organizations and people who are committed to protecting the right to vote and preserving our Constitution, just like Seth Moulton.
This includes an all-out effort to support campaigns at the local and state level in order to take back state houses and preserve election integrity.
All of that is necessary in order to defend our democracy, friend. And that’s what we’re committed to do here at Democracy Defense Fund.
This will only be possible if we all do our part — starting right now. So, will you split a donation between the Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/moulton-ddf]
Thank you,
Mary

name: Faith and Liberty News
subject: Socialism is experiencing a revival
body:
Hayek told us that, if old truths are to retain their hold on men's minds, they must be restated in the language and concepts of successive generations.
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMzQ5LWFmNmNmMTQ4NDJjYTQwN2I5ODU2NWM5ODBjYTYwOWJlIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3Jlc291cmNlcy5ob292ZXIub3JnL2hwLXJldml2YWxfc29jaWFsaXNtLXNpZ251cC8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWhwX3Jldml2YWxfc29jaWFsaXNtJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRV9GQUxSMTIxNTIwMjImb2xjPTQxODQ2In0/Z44ALBMK7UOYWkg-Z9xjqg)
---
---
| | Dear Friend,

Noble Prize winning economist F.A. Hayek told us that if old truths are to retain their hold on men’s minds, they must be restated in the language and concepts of successive generations.

Scores of Americans weren’t alive to experience the many atrocities of the 20th century that were caused by socialist systems. Because of this, socialist ideas are experiencing a revival in the U.S. and around the world. Proponents claim a more compassionate and positive effect on human flourishing.

But what is the truth?

To answer this question, the Hoover Institution gathered a group of its scholars to study the revival of socialism and current policy debates between socialist factions and their free-market counterparts.

And the results are eye-opening.

From what I’m told, you are someone who would be interested in learning about this phenomenon, and that’s why I’m emailing you today.

Our team recently launched a new online course called Socialism and Free-Market Capitalism: The Revival of Socialism in Current Policy Debates, so you can learn directly from these scholars about their findings. And I want to invite you to take it for FREE as my guest.

Inside these 6 lessons you’ll learn about:

* Constitutional safeguards against socialism
* False promises of socialism
* The effects of overregulation and anti-poverty policies

You can activate your free online course right now by using this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/hp-revival_socialism-signup/](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMzQ5LWFmNmNmMTQ4NDJjYTQwN2I5ODU2NWM5ODBjYTYwOWJlIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3Jlc291cmNlcy5ob292ZXIub3JnL2hwLXJldml2YWxfc29jaWFsaXNtLXNpZ251cC8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWhwX3Jldml2YWxfc29jaWFsaXNtJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRV9GQUxSMTIxNTIwMjImb2xjPTQxODQ2In0/WCOy1K1tn-RQYk6FbiAvag)**

When you do, you’ll receive Lesson 1 by email within minutes. Subsequent lessons will be emailed to you every 5 days until the course is completed.

With socialism experiencing a revival, it is vital that we revisit its record so we can restate its consequences “in the language and concepts of successive generations.”

I hope you’ll take me up on this offer to refresh your learning about the revival of socialism. **[Please use this link to get instant access to your free online course today!](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIyMzQ5LWFmNmNmMTQ4NDJjYTQwN2I5ODU2NWM5ODBjYTYwOWJlIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3Jlc291cmNlcy5ob292ZXIub3JnL2hwLXJldml2YWxfc29jaWFsaXNtLXNpZ251cC8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWhwX3Jldml2YWxfc29jaWFsaXNtJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BRV9GQUxSMTIxNTIwMjImb2xjPTQxODQ2In0/AL1_KMZVc1wFyjnYzbmCzA)**
Thank you,
Greg Greg Stamps | Online DevelopmentHoover Institution | Stanford University

---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

Hoover Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford CA USA 94305

name: Trump News HQ
subject: For a limited time
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history.
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zncakqauom6tdfl4qmj0ogo13l0q0asfg0evq8l0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chi68o32c3h2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztlce0utaaeujnser6iv77plcpd8sp0r8lgus2no_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chi68o32c3h2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7ovlg4m814c0262c5cpsihenbbkrqfflns7qo28_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chi68o32c3h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ The Federalist Papers ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. “The Federalist Papers” course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of “The Federalist Papers” on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of “The Federalist Papers” today: Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Marco Rubio
subject: [pictures inside]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
|
---
| | | Peter,

Reaching out about deadlines, falling short, and campaign updates aren't my favorite things to write, so today, I'm sending you a different kind of email. I know I've reached out so much these past few months and I know it can all seem repetitive, but because of your help, we were able to win reelection and save Florida from the radical Left.

I appreciate you taking the time to open this email, and I hope you'll read through to the end. I know it looks long, but I wanted to show you some family photos so you can see what drives me and motivates me to work for this beautiful country and why I'm so excited to keep doing so.

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62079124:6UT4xVGN7:m:1:3334294963:11D7E5F02E2E69050B1705C3C090B6BB:r "Marco's Parents on their Wedding Day")
---

My parents were married in Cuba before violent dictator Fidel Castro took over their home country. Eventually, to make a better life for me and my siblings, they moved to America to pursue the American Dream. After they saw Castro begin to turn their home country into a socialist wasteland with no chance to work their way out of poverty, they decided to raise us in the US.

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62079124:6UT4xVGN7:m:1:3334294963:11D7E5F02E2E69050B1705C3C090B6BB:r "Mario and Marco Rubio")
---

Growing up, my dad (holding me in the photo above), worked as a bartender, and my mom worked as a maid. They worked hard each and every day to make a better life for their family's future, and they eventually worked their way up to the middle class and out of poverty. I had to take out student loans, but my sister and I were first generation college students, and our parents were there cheering us on the entire time.

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62079124:6UT4xVGN7:m:1:3334294963:11D7E5F02E2E69050B1705C3C090B6BB:r "Marco, Jeanette holding baby Amanda")
---

I met my amazing wife, Jeanette, and not long after we got married, I ran for Florida's House of Representatives. We had our oldest daughter, Amanda, and we even took her on the trail as you can see! Daniella, Anthony, and Dominick completed our family and then we (cough cough... the kids) decided to expand our family by adding two fluffy pups, Winston and Arthur, who you're familiar with by now.

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62079124:6UT4xVGN7:m:1:3334294963:11D7E5F02E2E69050B1705C3C090B6BB:r "Marco and family")
---

Amanda got a little bit taller since she first hit the campaign trail with me, but after working in the Senate and seeing the dysfunction in Washington, I decided to run for President. Barack Obama and Joe Biden took our country down the wrong path and were raising taxes on hard-working families like mine. Not to mention it looked like Hillary Clinton could be the one to replace them...

The most important part of running for President, though, was having my family by my side once again on the trail - even through their first snow (we don't get a lot of that down in Miami). My parents, my kids, and their futures are what inspired me to run, so to have family by my side meant the world to me.
| | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62079124:6UT4xVGN7:m:1:3334294963:11D7E5F02E2E69050B1705C3C090B6BB:r "President Trump with Marco visiting a
Florida classroom")
---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62079124:6UT4xVGN7:m:1:3334294963:11D7E5F02E2E69050B1705C3C090B6BB:r "Marco Rubio meets with President Trump and FEMA")
---

After I dropped out of the presidential race, I committed to supporting our eventual nominee, President Donald Trump. And when he went on to win, we worked together to make America strong and empower the communities who deserve a helping hand.

President Trump and I worked to increase veterans' benefits because they put their lives on the line for us, and the least we can do is take care of them to show our gratitude. We doubled the child tax credit, so parents could spend less time at the dinner table deciding what they need to cut from their budget and more time making memories. And when COVID hit, I led the PPP bill that lent a helping hand to our small businesses - the backbone of our economy - so we could weather the storm and bounce back stronger than ever.

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62079124:6UT4xVGN7:m:1:3334294963:11D7E5F02E2E69050B1705C3C090B6BB:r "Marco with his family after winning his 2022 reelection")
---

Now, after winning reelection in November, I know our work is far from over. This isn't the America my parents left Cuba for or the America I want to leave my children. Right now, the American Dream is out of reach for those families and communities looking for a helping hand.

This is where you come in...

**I know you get a lot of these requests, but I 'm hoping after showing you what I'm fighting for, you'll step in before the American Dream slips out of reach for good.

I know these deadlines seem inconsequential or even sometimes fake, but if we reach this LAST Mid-Month goal today and continue to work to take back control of our country, we truly _can_ restore the American Dream. **
**[I hope you'll join me by making a donation today and fighting for our shared values:](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62079124:6UT4xVGN7:m:1:3334294963:11D7E5F02E2E69050B1705C3C090B6BB:r "I hope you’ll join me by making a donation today and fighting for our shared values:")**
---
| | | [I'M IN, MARCO!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62079124:6UT4xVGN7:m:1:3334294963:11D7E5F02E2E69050B1705C3C090B6BB:r "I’M IN, MARCO!")
---
I appreciate you so much for taking the time to read this,

Marco Rubio

**PS - Winston and Arthur say hi!**

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62079124:6UT4xVGN7:m:1:3334294963:11D7E5F02E2E69050B1705C3C090B6BB:r "Winston and Arthur say hi!")
---
| | |

* * *

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62079125:6UT4xVGN7:m:1:3334294963:11D7E5F02E2E69050B1705C3C090B6BB:r "https://secure.winred.com/marco-rubio-for-senate/american-dream-footer/?recurring=true")
---

A Personal Note from Marco Rubio:

My parents came to America before the murderous dictator Fidel Castro came to power and turned Cuba into a dangerous socialist wasteland. After my parents saw what he had done to their homeland, they decided to get to work to achieve the American Dream.

**I will never stop fighting for the American Dream because to me, it 's personal.** However, the American Dream that allowed the son of a bartender and a maid to become a U.S. Senator is slipping further and further out of reach and I need help to make sure we can restore it.

**[Join my fight to restore the American Dream:](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62079125:6UT4xVGN7:m:1:3334294963:11D7E5F02E2E69050B1705C3C090B6BB:r "Join my fight
to restore the American Dream:")**
| [RESTORE THE AMERICAN DREAM](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62079125:6UT4xVGN7:m:1:3334294963:11D7E5F02E2E69050B1705C3C090B6BB:r "RESTORE THE AMERICAN DREAM")
---

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62079126:6UT4xVGN7:m:1:3334294963:11D7E5F02E2E69050B1705C3C090B6BB:r "Stop the Dems Footer")

We need you to stop what you're doing immediately and take this seriously. **What you choose to do in the next 30 seconds could determine the future of our country.**

The fate of our country is currently hanging on by a thread. Now you have two choices and you decide what happens next:

1\. Ignore this message and let the Democrats continue to divide America and turn us against each other.

**2\. We can work like a team to make sure America 's best days are ahead of us. **

The choice is not between Republicans or Democrats. The choice isn't between Left or Right. _The choice is between commonsense values and radical lunacy._

**[If you're committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need you to step up NOW.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62079126:6UT4xVGN7:m:1:3334294963:11D7E5F02E2E69050B1705C3C090B6BB:r "If you’re committed to stopping the radical Left from taking over our country, we need
you to step up NOW.")**
| [STOP THE DEMS](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62079126:6UT4xVGN7:m:1:3334294963:11D7E5F02E2E69050B1705C3C090B6BB:r "STOP THE DEMS")
---
| Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
---
PO Box 530650
Miami, FL 33153
[Privacy Policy](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62079127:6UT4xVGN7:m:1:3334294963:11D7E5F02E2E69050B1705C3C090B6BB:r)

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system August 9, 2022.
For more information [click here](http://email.vervemail.com/p/i6UT4xVGN7). [Update your preferences](http://email.vervemail.com/p/o6UT4xVGN7)
[Unsubscribe](http://email.vervemail.com/p/o6UT4xVGN7) | [Unsubscribe via email](mailto:unsub-52339090038-echo7-78A9C700D65DB3A10F908BEEB58A635F@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings)

name: Brandon Tatum
subject: BLM vs Blexit
body:
I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - Black Lives Matter. [](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c7520%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=jNr48BGa4MOPT4febPnPMA&sysid=1)
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97715%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=7oqGylj6Zcv9xMDmU%2fzQeQ&sysid=1)

Friend,

**I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America -_Black Lives Matter_.**

Now, I know what you’re thinking... _What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis?_

I ask, “what about them is influential?!”

This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities?

No. They aren’t, but BLM is.

BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations.

I saw the hypocrisy long ago. **That’s why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. **

**BLEXIT** is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

_Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture_.

I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I’ll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support.

[_**Can you please support BLEXIT by sending a gift of $5, $10, $20.22, $100, or any amount you can afford today? Click here to donate >>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97716%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mWcRgW1F1jMTdfzQygxTqA&sysid=1)

**How I Started BLEXIT**

I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans.

With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me.

This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever.

I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM.

Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the “Black Lives Matter” organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn’t have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others.

Now, I’m giving back to the Black community to make sure they don’t become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes.

[_**Can you help me reach Black neighborhoods with a message of individualism, freedom, and entrepreneurship? Click here to donate any amount >>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97717%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Dr0YHSa8sU%2b2fVIorC9%2fzA&sysid=1)

BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law.

BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them.

BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character.

BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family.

_Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters._

**Here’s how you can help:**

_I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities_.

This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter.

BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97718%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TLbYPMvCAPGf0MT7aXTk7g&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97719%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4DpR9bEDZOh1z1bB6%2f5%2fDw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97710%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6Nb1yCSac%2fqTqFDcH15r3A&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97711%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=jfp3adw7DM0YcBTndUF0ZA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97712%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QjVTh741HYQ%2fLojQrsx2Aw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97713%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=j6hwuaktKT58Mz%2bFzZ%2fKiQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97714%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=i1ghfyLIuO16M3BA%2bP9TAQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97725%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UZ9oFSjfMu%2b71WzNwCsiAQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c97726%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=INy2dPg6lHALPrsqtNxCgw&sysid=1)

**HOW BLEXIT Works**

**Step One:** We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods.

**Step Two:** We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy.

We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time.

Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses.

As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them.

**Step Three:** Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media.

BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families.

**Step Four:** We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities.

What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a “DO” tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods.

Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man.

We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods.

**So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. **

It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us.

_“If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor.” - Candace Owens_

We believe in Faith, Freedom, and Family. With those three principles intact, you can find prosperity no matter how your life may have started. And I believe that is what will save us all in the end.

Thank you,

Brandon Tatum
Co-Founder
BLEXIT Foundation

clean_body: I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America - Black Lives Matter. Friend, I am a Black man, and I’m telling you exactly which organization is the most hateful, divisive group in the United States of America -Black Lives Matter. Now, I know what you’re thinking... What about the KKK, or what about neo-nazis? I ask, “what about them is influential?!” This is 2022. Does the KKK have institutional power like BLM does? Is the KKK receiving millions of dollars from corporations and Hollywood celebrities? No. They aren’t, but BLM is. BLM claims to speak for Black communities. But all I ever hear from BLM is how much they hate America. They only focus on victimhood to divide us as the greatest nation on Earth. BLM cries out for action, but the only action they do is burn down Black neighborhoods and cozy up to corporations. I saw the hypocrisy long ago. That’s why I started the BLEXIT Foundation with Candace Owens. BLEXIT is a non-profit bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are NOT a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. I believe God has put me on this mission to reach Black communities. I’ll tell you the full story of how I cofounded BLEXIT with Candace, but first, I must ask for your immediate support. How I Started BLEXIT I was an All-American high school football player in Fort Worth, Texas. I accepted a full athletic scholarship from the University of Arizona in 2005. I played at Arizona for five years and entered the NFL Draft in 2010; however, God had other plans. With my entire family around, I was not drafted. I was so angry. I ripped my shirt off. But, God had other plans for me. This led me to join the Tucson police force, and it changed my life forever. I learned what it meant to put my life on the line to save others. I woke up every morning to thank Jesus that I got to live another day to serve. This experience taught me a lot, but it was foundational to learning about the lies of BLM. Learning that BLM is lying to Black communities and teaching them to hate the police forever changed my opinion on the “Black Lives Matter” organization. But more importantly, I learned not to be a victim. Not getting drafted into the NFL taught me life lessons I wouldn’t have learned otherwise. I learned to serve others. Now, I’m giving back to the Black community to make sure they don’t become bought into this toxic victimhood mentality that BLM pushes. BLM incites lawlessness. BLEXIT stands for the rule of law. BLM destroys communities. BLEXIT empowers them. BLM only sees the color of your skin. BLEXIT sees character. BLM wants to disrupt families. BLEXT values the nuclear family. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with 42 grassroots chapter programs in 42 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. Here’s how you can help: I am looking to raise $83,000 online to support BLEXIT during this critical year. We must expand our chapters, build new leaders, and reach people within Black communities. This is a long game we are playing. If this were a football game, we would only be in the 1st quarter. BLM thinks they speak for Black communities, but we are taking over quickly and providing real opportunities for our members. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today: HOW BLEXIT Works Step One: We enter communities no one else dares to go into - Detroit, Baltimore, New Orleans, Houston, etc. We host events and set up chapters of volunteers who build a support network and help get our message of individualism and empowerment to Black neighborhoods. Step Two: We send the best volunteers and chapter members to our Leadership Academy. We build leaders from the ground up. In fact, our staff is full of stories of activists we hired from the Leadership Academy. They started as a chapter member and now work for us full time. Other members graduate from the Leadership Academy, and then they go back into their communities to support others or start their own businesses. As you can see, we are BUILDING neighborhoods, NOT destroying them. Step Three: Our educational content, both online and in-person, is teaching Black communities ideas they will never hear in the mainstream media. BLEXIT is teaching about individualism, pro-life, school choice, teaching REAL history (not Critical Race Theory), and creating patriotism among Black families. Step Four: We host large events with hundreds, sometimes thousands of attendees. Our events bring music, live entertainment, and education to Black communities. What I really want to emphasize is this - BLEXIT is a “DO” tank! We are out there meeting people in neighborhoods. Friend, this is deeply personal for me as a Black man. We have to save our communities. We must save our country from the toxic and divisive organizations like BLM that are tearing down our businesses and livelihoods. So, please, I implore you to send any amount you generously can. We are a 501(c)(3) organization, and your support is tax-deductible. People ask me, “What does BLEXIT mean?” It is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. “If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim, you become your own oppressor.” - Candace Owens We believe in Faith, Freedom, and Family. With those three principles intact, you can find prosperity no matter how your life may have started. And I believe that is what will save us all in the end. Thank you, Brandon Tatum Co-Founder BLEXIT Foundation 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: VP Mike Pence
subject: Have you gotten a copy of my book yet?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Advancing American Freedom
body:
I’m so privileged to be reaching out to you today with some BIG news! [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0295%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=iHSq0viBuFsEM12vt2kseA&sysid=1)

| |
---
| | | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43799%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SlrG0dZrWNDOUr2l7W2dww&sysid=1)
---

I’m so privileged to be reaching out to you today with some BIG news!

I’ve set aside a FREE signed copy of my new book just for you. Here’s the situation:

My new book - “So Help Me God” - will give you an exclusive look into my life in public service and all the incredible figures that helped me live it, from my Irish immigrant grandfather to my combat veteran father and my unstoppable 90 years young mother. Each played a role in helping me achieve my American dream.

I know it’s hard to believe, but I used to be a Democrat! We all make mistakes... One man drew me to the Republican movement through moments with a force I was never able to shake: Ronald Reagan. He reminded me of my lifelong love for the Constitution of the United States, and how conservative values are at the core of the American way of life.

He shaped my path, one that led to lessons in my early days that I carried with me all the way to the White House.

I can’t wait to share this journey with you.

That’s why I asked my team to reserve a signed copy of my book for you!

All you have to do is chip in $62 or more today to support my work to Advance American Freedom, and I’ll send you a signed copy.

It’s a win-win situation: you get a signed copy of the book and also help us get back to the policies that worked so well during the Trump-Pence Administration!

---
| | [CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c43790%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YPBzktTn4jwZ3JSEEiJKRQ&sysid=1)
---

I look forward to signing a book for you soon!

In Faith & Freedom,
Mike Pence
48th Vice President of The United States

---
|
---
| Paid for by Advancing American Freedom
---

801 Pennsylvania Ave Ste 930
Washington, DC 20004

name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Join the Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide
body:
| | This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ff9edea1db2d4b548155582cc214fc50&_e=6egqkBa8GfTBd6WskvJMvN4-J2NHmMjBKbjhXo9R_nuxo4Twh4CjKWT9mURbdGdZui3i3p8Iro78494DxDQC6Owe98IWFOtjb2InIWzP9XM1hPLQ1ey9eZjC_rqWJpw2bhDanSsRgCjONZLInzATG-E6sxa068sN4CQ20PRb1SURqeD0f-RVFaYiZElOk3V4En4oTBLj2_oYKijegkWSijKCGVa9qjZi-RoMuwMpXipnATrUNJ5VI4XpcQTzKvpnG0bGtdefhzae32HmXPcmoNs611cLcbn2SElF6GIlQaMCO2pK1GYaVgS4wxj9l1VX3K7p9NhFJrGS4pk1aEHnigrHAGcEKibAY1Tm0TaSMHLKb0fVi1_dHWVSJ0TOsBVM)
---
| | Dear Friend,

The last few years--and the recent election--have made it crystal clear to most Americans that we must deal urgently with the **corruption** of our nation's educational system.

Ronald Reagan warned us decades ago: "Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction."

Today it may be less than that.

That's because anti-American activists are proving to be very successful politically.

Look at their effectiveness, for example, in preventing school choice and blocking the charter school movement--even in many solidly conservative states!

Look also at their tactics.

Not only do they lie about their opponents' motives--accusing them of racism, for instance--they have even appealed for support from federal law enforcement by labeling parents who speak out at school board meetings as "domestic terrorists."

**Engaging these anti-American activists on the battlefield of education is critical to our hopes of preserving liberty and restoring limited constitutional government for future generations.**

Hillsdale College has been deeply engaged in this battle for decades. With the help of supporters like you, who agree with Hillsdale's mission, we are now determined to redouble our efforts at this crucial time for our nation--no matter the cost.

That's why we have set a goal to raise $5 million online by December 31 to expand our **[Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ff9edea1db2d4b548155582cc214fc50&_e=6egqkBa8GfTBd6WskvJMvN4-J2NHmMjBKbjhXo9R_nuxo4Twh4CjKWT9mURbdGdZui3i3p8Iro78494DxDQC6Owe98IWFOtjb2InIWzP9XM1hPLQ1ey9eZjC_rqWJpw2bhDanSsRgCjONZLInzATG-E6sxa068sN4CQ20PRb1SURqeD0f-RVFaYiZElOk3V4En4oTBLj2_oYKijegkWSijKCGVa9qjZi-RoMuwMpXiqO-H5cjY5evc6Ko83R_ZXQi5YkaiwYC1mhcGKujk8fzoul1NQkfQ2__NV8v45WoDAAY1vf37a7o82QbKXBuxmrYf1ju1qnhCybd-mcU6RRj8pEAJqIc4JDa6G7Hnc6s0yixpNmjNpC91L0pmtfSk07)** in 2023.

This vital project will give informed patriots across the country the ability to defend liberty through education effectively. And we need your help.

The project has three key objectives:

1. **Increase** the number of citizens (especially younger Americans) enrolling in our free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution," "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope," and our newest course, "The Real American Founding: A Conversation." **
**
2. **Expand** the circulation of _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty, to reach millions more Americans.
3. **Launch **additional Hillsdale-affiliated classical K-12 schools nationwide and **provide, free of charge,** our American classical K-12 curriculum (including the **_Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum_**) to thousands more American teachers and homeschoolers.

And your generous support is critical to our success. Here's why...

As I've written to you in the past, Hillsdale College **conducts its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as it does all of its work--while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

So, to meet our ambitious year-end funding goal, we need your help. A gift of **$10** , **$25** , **$50** , or **$100** will bring us closer to preserving the American way of life. But contributions of any size are appreciated.

Since we have less than a month remaining in 2022 to fund this project for the coming year, we urgently need your help.

**You can safely and securely renew your support using this link: [https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/cye-2022](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ff9edea1db2d4b548155582cc214fc50&_e=6egqkBa8GfTBd6WskvJMvN4-J2NHmMjBKbjhXo9R_nuxo4Twh4CjKWT9mURbdGdZui3i3p8Iro78494DxDQC6Owe98IWFOtjb2InIWzP9XM1hPLQ1ey9eZjC_rqWJpw2bhDanSsRgCjONZLInzATG-E6sxa068sN4CQ20PRb1SURqeD0f-RVFaYiZElOk3V4En4oTBLj2_oYKijegkWSijKCGVa9qjZi-RoMuwMpXipTJ-5G9mhAdI-uSivFSQW2MSL6AyCkk8Bhahwn0zVJ8WupiG0EHHG7qIHU-06JPPxaxPPrFvUKlvD9-Sn6-T055pSS0jDRz-OFYgsmQYjeRm7K3W9WjadRWeL6ZnQTNl5jfrdydpt3c7WMC_TvJXgA)**

As the forces of anti-Americanism redouble their own efforts to undermine informed patriotism in our schools and our culture and to subvert constitutionalism in our government, **we must engage them ever more aggressively --including on the battlefield of education.**

That's why I hope you'll make your most generous year-end gift before the December 31 IRS deadline.

Every dollar you can give will get us closer to our $5 million online fundraising goal, enabling us to expand our **Project to Defend Liberty Nationwide by Reaching and Teaching Millions** in 2023.

Thank you for your generosity. I hope you'll continue to stand with us by making **[a tax-deductible year-end gift before December 31](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=ff9edea1db2d4b548155582cc214fc50&_e=6egqkBa8GfTBd6WskvJMvN4-J2NHmMjBKbjhXo9R_nuxo4Twh4CjKWT9mURbdGdZui3i3p8Iro78494DxDQC6Owe98IWFOtjb2InIWzP9XM1hPLQ1ey9eZjC_rqWJpw2bhDanSsRgCjONZLInzATG-E6sxa068sN4CQ20PRb1SURqeD0f-RVFaYiZElOk3V4En4oTBLj2_oYKijegkWSijKCGVa9qjZi-RoMuwMpXipYq-L1YO1avY2TaQbyuf6r0IZItVcFIR4sNM3Kon2oqSjbqAZ1ukR8ibv_Z-FmuVEeCtGYIhNoYYG6QLJ17OjzeqFX0OWyLx9v_BjgWv5NSub81FVrjbjIMZWSBvnvD7-Qi_eYwvl90RjwtHmCKkC1)**.
