name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Ten years of work
body:
I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, How We Win -- just in time for Christmas!
| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp9pr4e72g38eoshphmcsdf80rijejm2dmh943rg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chh61p37c1h2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win_ \-- just in time for Christmas! **While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8pf6csc887i6cg59oaqde8uc5pbrvtqlg94qv10_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chh61p37c1h2bs)
---
[**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2b8v7hivep0nnebj6gn1dafsmdg76trmdocdsqg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chh61p37c1h2bs)
---
[Get my book](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs1lrm67ugsbkka4q4mhvh8tcndl1i763bebf6ng_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chh61p37c1h2bs)
---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2r6j9hk64099dbg9fk73mveljjjcmks8pblls78_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chh61p37c1h2bs) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za9uvfftroqh79c9ec8k48t5kkogdq40h0l2vd80_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chh61p37c1h2bs)
---
[Get my book](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdseh5tg8j9t8uhc5q4ms4v4dm7ncl4nqjasb0no_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chh61p37c1h2bs)
---
Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We’re helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. [**It all starts when you claim your copy of How We Win -- which can be YOURS for a gift of any amount today!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4iu5ohidskq1ju1837mehq6tekoo79l22lqsl50_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chh61p37c1h2bs)
---

---
For America,
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: As a nation we have turned slowly away
body:
Revisionists of America’s history would have you believe that our nation was founded on secular grounds and that “a great wa
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmg26bndp5k2ros91gb2pvcur5vbbmbkhtlvdti8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chj64or6chh2bs)
---
Hello, Revisionists of America’s history would have you believe that our nation was founded on secular grounds and that “a great wall of separation between Church and State” has been our guiding principle since the beginning. They would have you believe that our founders wanted Christianity to be completely absent from all forms and institutions of government. The truth of the matter is that, over time, we have allowed secularists, humanists, atheists, and infidels to pervert our Constitution into something our founding fathers never intended. Take a look at this quote from Benjamin Franklin, who wasn’t even a Christian. He was a Deist:

_“I have lived . . . a long time, and the longer I live, the more convincing proofs I see of this truth—that God governs in the affairs of men. And if a sparrow cannot fall to the ground without his notice, is it probable that an empire can rise without his aid? We have been assured . . . in the sacred writings, that ‘except the Lord build the House they labour in vain that build it.’”_

In fact, it was Ben Franklin who suggested that the Constitutional Convention should seek God’s blessing in an opening prayer at every session!

When I think about truths like this and contrast them with the utter contempt for and avoidance of any semblance of Christian thought by today’s governing leaders, I am both amazed and disgusted.
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z88j4doguo2f5kuk9pkfcbaiip5ct8ktaib9epp8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chj64or6chh2bs)
---
As a nation, we have turned slowly away from the God who “governs the affairs of men” and relied instead on our own understanding. Look where it has got us:
---
* Since the Roe v Wade ruling in 1973, an average of 600,000 babies have been murdered in the womb each year.
* As of 2018, gun violence is the leading cause of death for children and teens.
* Every year, excessive drinking is responsible for the deaths of more than 3,500 people under the legal drinking age.
* We’ve pushed God out of our classrooms, courtrooms, and living rooms—and we are reaping the consequences.

---
What’s the solution? We as a nation must invite Him back in. That starts with changing individual hearts and lives. And that change can only come about through the proclamation of God’s Word.
---
[Sign the pledge to stand for Christian values in America](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhr6db1v3pslluj698a8pjekdd6pal6dbmmfnsg0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chj64or6chh2bs)
---
If you are ready to be counted among those who wish to live the true Christian life without hesitation or apology, I invite you to sign a pledge resolving to do so. This pledge, created by the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_ , is a simple way to show that you stand with us and believe that America is a Christian nation. Change can and will take place when we as believers take our faith seriously. **[Will you stand shoulder to shoulder with me and pledge to stand for Christian values in America?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zg8g7ob14nidv92f6tl2esvuce56mi76mnhd9lk8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chj64or6chh2bs)** There is hope for the future of America—and it starts with a firm resolve to shine the light of Jesus Christ.

Sharing the Truth of God’s Word,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

clean_body: Revisionists of America’s history would have you believe that our nation was founded on secular grounds and that “a great wa | | | Hello, Revisionists of America’s history would have you believe that our nation was founded on secular grounds and that “a great wall of separation between Church and State” has been our guiding principle since the beginning. They would have you believe that our founders wanted Christianity to be completely absent from all forms and institutions of government. The truth of the matter is that, over time, we have allowed secularists, humanists, atheists, and infidels to pervert our Constitution into something our founding fathers never intended. Take a look at this quote from Benjamin Franklin, who wasn’t even a Christian. He was a Deist: “I have lived . . . a long time, and the longer I live, the more convincing proofs I see of this truth—that God governs in the affairs of men. And if a sparrow cannot fall to the ground without his notice, is it probable that an empire can rise without his aid? We have been assured . . . in the sacred writings, that ‘except the Lord build the House they labour in vain that build it.’” In fact, it was Ben Franklin who suggested that the Constitutional Convention should seek God’s blessing in an opening prayer at every session! When I think about truths like this and contrast them with the utter contempt for and avoidance of any semblance of Christian thought by today’s governing leaders, I am both amazed and disgusted. | | As a nation, we have turned slowly away from the God who “governs the affairs of men” and relied instead on our own understanding. Look where it has got us: Since the Roe v Wade ruling in 1973, an average of 600,000 babies have been murdered in the womb each year. As of 2018, gun violence is the leading cause of death for children and teens. Every year, excessive drinking is responsible for the deaths of more than 3,500 people under the legal drinking age. We’ve pushed God out of our classrooms, courtrooms, and living rooms—and we are reaping the consequences. What’s the solution? We as a nation must invite Him back in. That starts with changing individual hearts and lives. And that change can only come about through the proclamation of God’s Word. If you are ready to be counted among those who wish to live the true Christian life without hesitation or apology, I invite you to sign a pledge resolving to do so. This pledge, created by the ministry of Pathway to Victory , is a simple way to show that you stand with us and believe that America is a Christian nation. Change can and will take place when we as believers take our faith seriously. There is hope for the future of America—and it starts with a firm resolve to shine the light of Jesus Christ. Sharing the Truth of God’s Word, Dr. Robert Jeffress If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, . 625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Friend, Our Founding Fathers were brilliant men with _[**an incredible vision**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=389b894d08104b9e88f0905dce85b853&_e=fP-JPC_V6z2EBQkh8SteElMbtBHYO1Agjg_Z7CzOP-M6Db0k6KjT6sVY2sYC9umXJ41vioor-yE_vjHqT3nMmOo0kQvhHn_7zctno7IlkgPsUCxOWf6fTrrzXG9lkTxShAIKXWzKvl9SeQlpo3_7JI2xp9G7pr8cMBvP-kI4br-N7MLF29BCZI4dOah-O45-g6LCRZAZbI_EoOBnadhsVjzEztY3K1aEvkgWa0hk6vnvv0BDlcTfANLBzSVUYye2H9AGU2QFdZu8NBeD4fyNqIq1x_9nHtRaQW8KrF4nKC4SxSYy0dD4HEEK8P3G12lRXIEoYNvr-ooemQ3UZX1ssKQ1if17gK7ZA3njzgcKUNs7keselacJO7WUPOPPFCyuNc0FsaIx96UJdG7N0WaiWw%3D%3D)_ for what the United States would look like, and one of their greatest accomplishments was the Bill of Rights.
They laid out protections for many of the rights and freedoms we hold dear today, like...
* Freedom of religion, speech, press, and assembly
* Right to keep and bear arms
* Right to due process

Friend, my job as Attorney General is to protect the rights of EVERY Virginian – and it’s a job I take incredibly seriously.
_[**In honor of Bill of Rights Day, will you chip in $10 to help me fight for the Commonwealth and uphold the rights our Founding Fathers held dear?**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=389b894d08104b9e88f0905dce85b853&_e=fP-JPC_V6z2EBQkh8SteElMbtBHYO1Agjg_Z7CzOP-M6Db0k6KjT6sVY2sYC9umXJ41vioor-yE_vjHqT3nMmOo0kQvhHn_7zctno7IlkgPsUCxOWf6fTrrzXG9lkTxShAIKXWzKvl9SeQlpo3_7JI2xp9G7pr8cMBvP-kI4br-N7MLF29BCZI4dOah-O45-g6LCRZAZbI_EoOBnadhsVjzEztY3K1aEvkgWa0hk6vnvv0BDlcTfANLBzSVUYye2yoqioj6jPDGc66B7CYcmsEVLCkKnti4f05A1mKWj3h_ubSTEqq1wjNW58BwON15vq6b8a1y1Wq27kKuW-NoT-jlZC4tlHENq08GFPUprIIyoQe10PqqzgKExGeah0Hi1jcsFLK1o-mXD9d7ch29Fnw%3D%3D)_

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: For a limited time
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f14166af3e8b46e49972ebcb1005450c&_e=9mnztD0mCK4WlckICAa2UXOWegLKNGnV80Jw8aq4xKIOeSc5Gxbn5cJiTOaj9JGaVMYAhJNkyo3reImkLohFjcv2uCOUBUotM7IRrQ3bRpyU3pJLy0rY-dw51BqgK0hp_S0NhFzycsHqGmVGSrY3FJHI0-b0UvgHMt7FPKJxzRlOThKxcv100tsIdZkktUH3HKFpB5uLMKyI7xLoJbBVX37Gxr8v00IUVwUTvzrbEJ3dx1L-3pbetsSUoUa_a0X_TitDdA4U3Tv_1pAWN73FdQx9MFk7th-7o95G3CC7NEkKqieE8rbajnAtXOu_Mh4MQsQwE2P97pPHyze2C9syJp4hir3FO3MIKTIHjn-O7BKC_oW_rAD3lE7aQV30k8GrlurvMbvEeVaiQ4c2mAp1tQ%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation's history. They've shaken me, and I'm sure they've affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** --not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as "the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written." That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I 'd like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, "_The Federalist Papers_ ,"on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**" The Federalist Papers"**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It's taught by Hillsdale's knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation's founding principles of liberty. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f14166af3e8b46e49972ebcb1005450c&_e=9mnztD0mCK4WlckICAa2UXOWegLKNGnV80Jw8aq4xKIOeSc5Gxbn5cJiTOaj9JGaVMYAhJNkyo3reImkLohFjcv2uCOUBUotM7IRrQ3bRpyU3pJLy0rY-dw51BqgK0hp_S0NhFzycsHqGmVGSrY3FJHI0-b0UvgHMt7FPKJxzRlOThKxcv100tsIdZkktUH3HKFpB5uLMKyI7xLoJbBVX37Gxr8v00IUVwUTvzrbEJ3dx1L-3pbetsSUoUa_a0X_RwVBwZKnsU0-wldLsm2N1XlJzrYaTVtZZkqwxEYkRWQsUSHiYD98pLpBtClcxvAn71KgowE2HZTr1QADJIsS8rfeogw9gljrv_WWex3bzzVq4IFjnyxgA36ZwGI9Hkkt8r-w2lpqsF0Y2YXRY86LBQ%3D%3D) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_" The Federalist Papers"_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won't last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**" The Federalist Papers"**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=f14166af3e8b46e49972ebcb1005450c&_e=9mnztD0mCK4WlckICAa2UXOWegLKNGnV80Jw8aq4xKIOeSc5Gxbn5cJiTOaj9JGaVMYAhJNkyo3reImkLohFjcv2uCOUBUotM7IRrQ3bRpyU3pJLy0rY-dw51BqgK0hp_S0NhFzycsHqGmVGSrY3FJHI0-b0UvgHMt7FPKJxzRlOThKxcv100tsIdZkktUH3HKFpB5uLMKyI7xLoJbBVX37Gxr8v00IUVwUTvzrbEJ3dx1L-3pbetsSUoUa_a0X_DsnO6XIbtIDo1--eFIgImas-72GBrjgu5yGxWRK4gGBXl7vMzRJm4ix1BR61rp-uEKhYDar4L-DIbynZInlCLvuHVBK6ONe5TGM1NWO9mtXxZdz7KVNe6dDhr24Dsdu606JEcTw9qHl3hB_FiyAo5g%3D%3D) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---

Sent to Defend the Constitution subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Our biggest caseload ever!
body:
We work hard every day to earn your support and honor your trust, and I am extremely grateful to you.

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

We work hard every day to earn your support and honor your trust, and I am extremely grateful to you for your commitment to our shared values.
And I can't thing of a better way to thank you... _and encourage you to join our family of contributors_ ...than to make sure we keep bringing you the kind of results you want most!
Because besides hard work, I feel that what counts most for all of us is that _we are making important headway_.
_So, with a new year just days away, your support right now is critically important_!
[Can I count on you to make a financial contribution today to help us stay on track with all our lawsuits and investigations?](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61426&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61426&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)
---

I anticipate that Judicial Watch will carry its largest and most important caseload in our 29-year history into 2023 and engage our full arsenal of _research_ , _investigations_ and _litigation_ into critically important public policy fronts. Like this one:

**We continue to lead in exposing the abuse of taxpayer dollars to spread poisonous Critical Race Theory (CRT) propaganda in our public institutions, including schools and our military.**

Judicial Watch investigators first exposed shocking details about CRT in **Virginia** , **Rhode Island, Maryland** and **Massachusetts** ...how it promotes Marxist ideology and a highly distorted and damaging view of American history to students as young as first-graders...

...then Judicial Watch lawyers began fighting for teachers' First Amendment rights for those brave enough to dare criticize **CRT**! We settled our first lawsuit, in **Massachusetts** , and are now representing another **Massachusetts** teacher and a teacher in **Illinois**.

And through a successful Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit, we forced the release of documents that _proved_**CRT** is part of the curriculum at the **U.S. Military Academy** at West Point, and we are pursuing similar lawsuits to uncover the extent to CRT propaganda at the **U.S. Naval Academy** and at the **U.S. Air Force Academy.**

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61426&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)
---

**_And we continue to lead in the fight to keep our elections honest_! **

The Left is not giving up on its efforts to "federalize" our elections, shred the Constitution and give control over election management to career bureaucrats at the politicized Biden Justice Department...which is as committed as ever to suing states that have enacted commonsense, conservative election law reform. Incredible.

On the side of fair and honest elections, Judicial Watch lawyers and investigators are successfully pressuring states to follow federal law and make reasonable efforts to maintain accurate voter registration rolls... _the best way we know of to prevent voter fraud_.

Judicial Watch is proudly conservative, but we are also nonpartisan...just ask the Democrat _and_ Republican state election officials we have taken to court over their failures to clean their voter rolls of ineligible voters! _Our commitment is to keep our elections honest and conducted according to the rule of law_.

We are currently in federal court with major lawsuits against **Colorado, New York** and **Pennsylvania** over their unlawful dirty voter rolls, and our election integrity team is reviewing federal and state data to determine if more states and counties need to be warned, and, if necessary prosecuted, by Judicial Watch. Stay tuned!

And as we have in 2022, we are also prepared to use the legal system to challenge liberal efforts to enact or make permanent electoral practices that are _open invitations to voter fraud_ , like extending voting beyond the Election Day established by federal law (which we challenged in **Illinois**) and mail-in voting and same-day voter registration (which was overturned in **Delaware,** supported by a "friend of the court" brief filed by Judicial Watch).

**[And that's why I ask you to make a special contribution today.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61426&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)**

Requests for help from citizens across the country on these matters are pressing....and I know you share my commitment to _exposing_ the spread of CRT propaganda, _keeping_ our elections honest, and _forcing_ accountability when serious allegations of corruption are leveled at politicians in both political parties, including issues of Biden family corruption!

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61426&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)
---

I wouldn't ask for your help again if [Judicial Watch didn't require sustained support](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61426&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE) for these investigations and lawsuits, especially as we prepare for 2023.

Thank you, in advance, for giving us your support to help us fulfill our mission on behalf of the rule of law and the people's "right to know."

Sincerely,

Tom Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=61426&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9Q01qY3dPRGs1TlRRJTNE)

So, with a new year just days away, your support right now is critically important! | I anticipate that Judicial Watch will carry its largest and most important caseload in our 29-year history into 2023 and engage our full arsenal of research , investigations and litigation into critically important public policy fronts. Like this one: We continue to lead in exposing the abuse of taxpayer dollars to spread poisonous Critical Race Theory (CRT) propaganda in our public institutions, including schools and our military. Judicial Watch investigators first exposed shocking details about CRT in Virginia , Rhode Island, Maryland and Massachusetts ...how it promotes Marxist ideology and a highly distorted and damaging view of American history to students as young as first-graders... ...then Judicial Watch lawyers began fighting for teachers' First Amendment rights for those brave enough to dare criticize CRT! We settled our first lawsuit, in Massachusetts , and are now representing another Massachusetts teacher and a teacher in Illinois. And through a successful Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit, we forced the release of documents that provedCRT is part of the curriculum at the U.S. Military Academy at West Point, and we are pursuing similar lawsuits to uncover the extent to CRT propaganda at the U.S. Naval Academy and at the U.S. Air Force Academy. And we continue to lead in the fight to keep our elections honest! The Left is not giving up on its efforts to "federalize" our elections, shred the Constitution and give control over election management to career bureaucrats at the politicized Biden Justice Department...which is as committed as ever to suing states that have enacted commonsense, conservative election law reform. Incredible. On the side of fair and honest elections, Judicial Watch lawyers and investigators are successfully pressuring states to follow federal law and make reasonable efforts to maintain accurate voter registration rolls... the best way we know of to prevent voter fraud. Judicial Watch is proudly conservative, but we are also nonpartisan...just ask the Democrat and Republican state election officials we have taken to court over their failures to clean their voter rolls of ineligible voters! Our commitment is to keep our elections honest and conducted according to the rule of law. We are currently in federal court with major lawsuits against Colorado, New York and Pennsylvania over their unlawful dirty voter rolls, and our election integrity team is reviewing federal and state data to determine if more states and counties need to be warned, and, if necessary prosecuted, by Judicial Watch. Stay tuned! And as we have in 2022, we are also prepared to use the legal system to challenge liberal efforts to enact or make permanent electoral practices that are open invitations to voter fraud , like extending voting beyond the Election Day established by federal law (which we challenged in Illinois) and mail-in voting and same-day voter registration (which was overturned in Delaware, supported by a "friend of the court" brief filed by Judicial Watch). Requests for help from citizens across the country on these matters are pressing....and I know you share my commitment to exposing the spread of CRT propaganda, keeping our elections honest, and forcing accountability when serious allegations of corruption are leveled at politicians in both political parties, including issues of Biden family corruption! I wouldn't ask for your help again if for these investigations and lawsuits, especially as we prepare for 2023. Thank you, in advance, for giving us your support to help us fulfill our mission on behalf of the rule of law and the people's "right to know." Sincerely, Tom Fitton President | | Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 Third Street SW, Suite 800 Washington, DC 20024 (C)2022, All Rights Reserved Judicial Watch is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization. Contributions are received from individuals, foundations, and corporations and are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. | |

clean_body: It’ll only take a moment. | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | | | | | | | Let me explain why this is so important: 1\. The Midterm Election was just a month ago and 2\. 3\. Republicans will be watching my campaign’s fundraising numbers carefully to see how strong or weak my campaign is ahead of 2024. I only have less than 12 hours to close the gap and can’t afford to fall short at a time like this. | | | | | | I appreciate your support, \-- Dr. Raul Ruiz | PO Box 1566 Indio, CA 92202 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. subject: You might have already heard

subject: As a nation we have turned slowly away
body:
Revisionists of America’s history would have you believe that our nation was founded on secular grounds and that “a great wa
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhsd9spse9lurnu9oj6hq0fjdpno5td0f8go4518_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chj60o74cph2bs)
---
Hello, Revisionists of America’s history would have you believe that our nation was founded on secular grounds and that “a great wall of separation between Church and State” has been our guiding principle since the beginning. They would have you believe that our founders wanted Christianity to be completely absent from all forms and institutions of government. The truth of the matter is that, over time, we have allowed secularists, humanists, atheists, and infidels to pervert our Constitution into something our founding fathers never intended. Take a look at this quote from Benjamin Franklin, who wasn’t even a Christian. He was a Deist:

_“I have lived . . . a long time, and the longer I live, the more convincing proofs I see of this truth—that God governs in the affairs of men. And if a sparrow cannot fall to the ground without his notice, is it probable that an empire can rise without his aid? We have been assured . . . in the sacred writings, that ‘except the Lord build the House they labour in vain that build it.’”_

In fact, it was Ben Franklin who suggested that the Constitutional Convention should seek God’s blessing in an opening prayer at every session!

When I think about truths like this and contrast them with the utter contempt for and avoidance of any semblance of Christian thought by today’s governing leaders, I am both amazed and disgusted.
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlcdnpdfprh38pch71vhcinlo06l166rj2rokdvo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chj60o74cph2bs)
---
As a nation, we have turned slowly away from the God who “governs the affairs of men” and relied instead on our own understanding. Look where it has got us:
---
* Since the Roe v Wade ruling in 1973, an average of 600,000 babies have been murdered in the womb each year.
* As of 2018, gun violence is the leading cause of death for children and teens.
* Every year, excessive drinking is responsible for the deaths of more than 3,500 people under the legal drinking age.
* We’ve pushed God out of our classrooms, courtrooms, and living rooms—and we are reaping the consequences.

---
What’s the solution? We as a nation must invite Him back in. That starts with changing individual hearts and lives. And that change can only come about through the proclamation of God’s Word.
---
[Sign the pledge to stand for Christian values in America](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zt6vjq4o57lunk6ap2e2n560vlu9n0iakclbv3ng_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chj60o74cph2bs)
---
If you are ready to be counted among those who wish to live the true Christian life without hesitation or apology, I invite you to sign a pledge resolving to do so. This pledge, created by the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_ , is a simple way to show that you stand with us and believe that America is a Christian nation. Change can and will take place when we as believers take our faith seriously. **[Will you stand shoulder to shoulder with me and pledge to stand for Christian values in America?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zca3fuds1begr8nekj23kpvvdptvfnhflb5mqmt0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chj60o74cph2bs)** There is hope for the future of America—and it starts with a firm resolve to shine the light of Jesus Christ.

Sharing the Truth of God’s Word,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

Though at the same time, stocks of goods have risen and used car, furniture, and toy prices fell. Putting us in a very interesting place. While inflation has moderated, prices are still rising enough to be a problem for the central bank. name: United Rural Democrats
subject: Rural voters don't go in a box
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United Rural Democrats](https://click
body:
No matter how hard people try to put us in one. | | | Hi Peter – Rural voters don't fit in a box, no matter how hard people try to put us in one. We've heard it throughout our time in rural organizing. National pundits and so-called political experts almost always refer to rural voters as a monolithic bloc. This couldn't be farther from the truth. **As a team of rural Americans, we learn something new about the rural experience every day.** Some of us come from rural suburbs, others from small towns or farming communities. Our families work in manufacturing, energy, agriculture, education, healthcare, retail, and much more. And while most of us love a good football rivalry or live music show, we also care about climate change, consumer prices, infrastructure, healthcare epidemics, and inequality. **Rural towns are as different as can be, and our voters should be treated that way.** That's why United Rural Democrats have created a network of rural volunteers and organizers – people who know how to talk and listen to rural voters because they are from rural communities too. **[The hard truth is that Democrats have been guilty of treating rural voters as a monolith for too long. Will you help support our organization as we work to make sure that rural voters are prioritized in politics and policies so we can win more solid majorities?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2GcsSTWmbFMio5Z2PhLt7Ut8wabW9X2SuW8eSRb1GK7FEk8RHB93tt4EPI-NVGIuPUejlfTYqctQHjsyG_Pq--cxz5iHBqesNQqyGBPUq5mx5s5VbWnaOExqcViX9C7acRF-AiTHaUgJKrBx4in0q0_HDaI2yp8_hc98D-BE5Dl8nvaL2x6F-r7cnVeOgUqCQgZ0xGVwGHqKOjXfjcj5_52e_fTHkYTGqY9n7ZqWNvOOYT6cXIJblXnftw-aNnjYZvM-o0WjyXazJWprd010bgzMN8kwex5ljNyBY2e8CtQlW0UEvSIZopwL6OrYcX-iaBy/3s0/1Yx3SiKbRpe3-BaLmRo9Kg/h0/6FaA6s4EoScQjt1wNrQr4oGXjXy3xqbqx97-hUyQev0)** **[CHIP IN HERE****](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xNG6r6b6yi4Uz9vCRXD2GcsSTWmbFMio5Z2PhLt7Ut8_pFh6epVFUD9KNBllwsjCHyoZrUbN7uRw715Ft33b7Pr6QoQlELcQJBr6othmpY8RUkfi94vEE7s-sKcd9PXLKeM0CURq2ss71cI2S-LRaS9Z5M6AZX6TBmp3rlx7Kp5Dk5vTshHtKi4e4wx5-JSQXI9tFqp9QgGa74j2WwnoHvJywJAKYssLXs7Syakaij3PtKswGGTghQZM0mzela9CV4_1AWVT1CxVk1cDWyNtxJL0ud-CDYiHxCFfNTf8AJCxVVycKN70V96pqRla-huNfMT007rmUStOStxo5PAH4W/3s0/1Yx3SiKbRpe3-BaLmRo9Kg/h1/fxYKEdwmFPgmQDzntfNDI1i5C0-en8XnDrhAX2Qvx3E)** Thank you, Peter, for your support. \- United Rural Democrats

clean_body: No matter how hard people try to put us in one. | | | Hi Peter – Rural voters don't fit in a box, no matter how hard people try to put us in one. We've heard it throughout our time in rural organizing. National pundits and so-called political experts almost always refer to rural voters as a monolithic bloc. This couldn't be farther from the truth. As a team of rural Americans, we learn something new about the rural experience every day. Some of us come from rural suburbs, others from small towns or farming communities. Our families work in manufacturing, energy, agriculture, education, healthcare, retail, and much more. And while most of us love a good football rivalry or live music show, we also care about climate change, consumer prices, infrastructure, healthcare epidemics, and inequality. Rural towns are as different as can be, and our voters should be treated that way. That's why United Rural Democrats have created a network of rural volunteers and organizers – people who know how to talk and listen to rural voters because they are from rural communities too. Thank you, Peter, for your support. \- United Rural Democrats United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue?

| | |

| | [](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fbrycereeves.com/1/0100018516750559-c1363e89-c134-4230-8593-432eb520ad86-000000/_Js5ocPZpB6WSL2kHTEdHdOriJA=300)

| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASECONTACT:JAMES MANETZJAMES@BRYCEREEVES.COM
---
| Governor Youngkin Announces Push to Remove the Age Cap on the Military Retiree Tax Cut, Asks Reeves to Carry the Bill
---
| **Richmond, VA- Dec. 15th, 2022:** This morning, Governor Glenn Youngkin (R-VA) presented his packet of budget amendments and priority initiatives to the Virginia General Assembly's Joint Money Committees. Among these priorities was a push to remove the age cap on recently signed [SB528](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flis.virginia.gov%2Fcgi-bin%2Flegp604.exe%3Fses=222%26typ=bil%26val=sb528/1/0100018516750559-c1363e89-c134-4230-8593-432eb520ad86-000000/TYla7NBARL7DuUNtwo20oert-qU=300), carried by Senator Bryce Reeves (R-Spotsylvania) in the 2022 legislative session. [SB528](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flis.virginia.gov%2Fcgi-bin%2Flegp604.exe%3Fses=222%26typ=bil%26val=sb528/2/0100018516750559-c1363e89-c134-4230-8593-432eb520ad86-000000/LcHLCaY9QFOvqxT6m2ZB-vbNdOQ=300), as it stands, provides a rolling income tax cut on retirement pay to military retirees ages 55 and older. Senator Reeves has worked on renditions of the bill before with no age requirement, and has been asked to coordinate with Governor Youngkin's policy team to make this goal a reality during the coming session. “I wish to personally thank Governor Youngkin for fulfilling a promise he made to me at the signing of [SB528](https://f1v3ff69.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flis.virginia.gov%2Fcgi-bin%2Flegp604.exe%3Fses=222%26typ=bil%26val=sb528/3/0100018516750559-c1363e89-c134-4230-8593-432eb520ad86-000000/PfmphRSFOOHifFy8bc0I9F5jiMY=300)", said Reeves. "I truly appreciate his confidence in my ability to bring this critical piece of legislation to fruition. This ensures that we take care of those veterans who entered military service at an early age and need to begin a second career after they retire. It’s critically important that Virginia retains our best and brightest from our nation’s military. This gesture goes a long way to those veterans who leave active duty and want to make Virginia their permanent home." Reeves has carried a litany of military and veteran-based legislation in the past, and serves as Co-Chair of the General Assembly Military and Veterans Caucus (GAMVC). Some of Reeves' past veteran-based legislation includes the establishment of veterans treatment dockets, expansion of the Virginia Military Survivors and Dependents Education Program, and a variety of tax cuts.
---
| ### Bryce Reeves is a small business owner, auxiliary sheriff's deputy in Culpeper County, former Army Ranger, and former Prince William County narcotics detective. He currently represents the 17th District in the Virginia Senate, which includes the City of Fredericksburg and the Counties of Albemarle (part), Culpeper (part), Louisa (part), Orange, and Spotsylvania (part). Senator Reeves serves on the Senate Committee on Rehabilitation and Social Services and sits on the Committees on Local Government, General Laws and Technology, and Privileges and Elections. In addition, Senator Reeves is Co-chair of the Virginia General Assembly Military and Veterans Caucus, as well as Minority Whip in the State Senate. Senator Reeves resides in Spotsylvania County.
---

name: Bernie Sanders
body:
Justice Democrats is launching its search to find the next progressive candidates for Congress to join me, AOC, Jamaal Bowman, Rashida Tlaib, and other working-class leaders.
#
Peter,
Over just a few years, Justice Democrats has recruited and helped elect a strong, diverse, working-class slate of progressives to the U.S. House that includes Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Jamaal Bowman, Cori Bush, and Summer Lee.
But now is not the time to just sit back and relax. We need to elect even more progressive champions to fight for issues that match the scale of the crises we face, such as Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, fighting obscene levels of wealth and income inequality, getting big money out of politics, and more.
But here's the truth, Peter: It takes tremendous effort and resources to recruit working-class primary challengers and help them win. Justice Democrats just launched their 2024 candidate recruitment efforts, and they need to raise $120,000 in the next 72 hours to take on the establishment in Congress. _That’s why I'm asking:_
[**Will you join me in supporting Justice Democrats today with a $3 contribution? Every donation will help recruit more progressive candidates to challenge the political establishment and corporate elite. This is important.**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123208?refcode=em20221215-26564&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=26564%2E1203867%2E1G5n7Y)
**[Contribute $3](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123208?refcode=em20221215-26564&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=26564%2E1203867%2E1G5n7Y)**
The unfortunate reality is that it takes an incredible amount of money to run campaigns from start to finish, especially for progressive candidates challenging entrenched, corporate-backed incumbents. That's why it's so extraordinary what Justice Democrats has built over the last few years, with people chipping in what they can afford to take on the billionaire class that wants to protect the status quo.
The truth is that we are up against some very powerful special interests that have been at war with the working class for decades. I'm talking about Wall Street, the pharmaceutical industry, the health insurance industry, the fossil fuel industry, the military industrial complex, the private prison industrial complex and large corporations who continue to exploit their employees while they bring in record profits.
Progressive candidates recruited by Justice Democrats in the months ahead will be up against corporate-backed incumbents with unlimited sums of money. And you can bet that right-wing groups like AIPAC will be doing everything they can to stop our movement. AIPAC spent millions of dollars against Nina Turner, Summer Lee, and Jessica Cisneros because they are afraid of strong, progressive women of color who are fighting for the working class.
**To find the next class of strong progressive candidates to run for Congress and advance our fight for Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, racial justice, and an economy that works for everyone, Justice Democrats needs your help today.**
The Democratic Party must become the party that stands up for the working class of this country. And we can make that happen by electing more progressives who will fight for working people to Congress and transforming the Democratic Party from the inside out.
**I hope you will join me today in supporting the Justice Democrats 2024 candidate recruitment launch.** Justice Democrats relies solely on grassroots donations to recruit and elect the strongest possible working-class progressive candidates to Congress, and that's why I have to ask:
[**Can you chip in $3 to fund the Justice Democrats candidate recruitment efforts and help them reach their $120,000 fundraising goal? I would not ask if it were not so important.**](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123208?refcode=em20221215-26564&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=26564%2E1203867%2E1G5n7Y)
Your contribution today will give Justice Democrats the early funds they need to take on the political establishment and elect more progressive candidates. Thank you for chipping in today if you can afford it.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
**[Contribute](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123208?refcode=em20221215-26564&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=26564%2E1203867%2E1G5n7Y)**

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank [here.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=23&akid=26564%2E1203867%2E1G5n7Y) We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong. Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the [Centers for Disease Control](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=24&akid=26564%2E1203867%2E1G5n7Y) and your state public health department.
---

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221215-26564-footer&t=25&refcode2=26564_1203867_1G5n7Y&akid=26564%2E1203867%2E1G5n7Y)**
---
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Federal candidates or officeholders mentioned above are not asking for more than $5,000 per calendar year from individuals or other federally permissible sources, nor are they asking for any funds from corporations, labor unions, or any other federally prohibited sources.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226, Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: [us@justicedemocrats.com](mailto:us@justicedemocrats.com)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=26&akid=26564%2E1203867%2E1G5n7Y)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=26564%2E1203867%2E1G5n7Y)

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: How We Win
body:
I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, How We Win -- just in time for Christmas!
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpltgr1a879lutnvg2ijoftkpdl5koipbpfs7l6o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chh6eoj2cdh2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win_ \-- just in time for Christmas! **While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zueh6btfak3kvnj57os6ig36qs6t4sdcejnbq388_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chh6eoj2cdh2bs)
---
[**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6nprjme62b3cgd36577mfusk3ojn69p5jfei0r8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chh6eoj2cdh2bs)
---
[Get my book](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z86f50sjub4pk0sfhno0ptn4erhusi89q94l8bc0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chh6eoj2cdh2bs)
---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z0c13jtck6hutlb06l0m5gtbvm678v6e7p5gli30_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chh6eoj2cdh2bs) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znqj8j3ju6oql368l69kbqu8m2vgshon6efc1atg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chh6eoj2cdh2bs)
---
[Get my book](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcr1gtltjbc6p9cig74ps2f5ee0277kok8vlpo80_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chh6eoj2cdh2bs)
---
Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We’re helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. [**It all starts when you claim your copy of How We Win -- which can be YOURS for a gift of any amount today!**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrmab6d231am9379ft9bk4kdo01hpetlv0hnq7oo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chh6eoj2cdh2bs)
---
| | [Get my book ](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z332rffs8nkduemqaq65v5to5vql2oq5i3srfj6g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chh6eoj2cdh2bs)
---
For America,
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

body:

Peter, Our historic victory on November 8th was all thanks to grassroots supporters like you, but the battle is still raging for America’s future.

[**KEEP REPUBLICAN MOMENTUM GOING**](http://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=f83b7570e11d45eda858aedf06c4fcb3&_e=7Qa2CPQWcmJ2bMOQOT6TyLm9bNXrihSeForpNCbB21dXNaERH9QqtjGXne-CsLYUKlcxNR2m-8hUjK2LrSDgWPXkiE2788kk1lWiKsSPhTxhBeDQXazNo3dmDGhk8ZujswI9F2QF0jhx_NK7OEhMVM4Zq3t9-eWYx13j-mqQv4mAbNzYHwtXQKxfcfORaj6Mi7_VP6LlyvWq1RVuxng6PhY69PBvKdTBTv51Omd0KosMlsc-RIXlfSPkaiZWMMmEaBOQMCFxw9ITzkU32Ica4F03vGiCuck_AXeAAgPWcJDaE6Y8_nohu0NcsnRQzwcb3vw6SbyBgjEEmX_1d2UDXmnUutd1T3QfKfI_1akMusi1DvCFrvmHRrQrFYys8iDariexxRoVlidp3uzK2Gi9RQ%3D%3D)

I’m ready to defend faith, family, freedom, and opportunity at every turn because our nation and our children's future are worth fighting for. your help to reach our goal. **

I’m ready to defend faith, family, freedom, and opportunity at every turn because our nation and our children's future are worth fighting for. I will be the voice for families and hardworking Alabamians in Washington, and I won’t back down from preserving America’s future. Our FINAL 2022 Mid-Month deadline is here and we need your help to reach our goal. It’s time for our nation to thrive again and for the American Dream to prosper. I’m counting on every Alabama patriot to rush in your support to keep our momentum going. Can I count on you, Peter? Thank you, | | | | | | Katie Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.

| | | (Want to unsubscribe? See link below) As Trump's former personal attorney, Giuliani played a huge role in the attempt to overthrow the 2020 election. He led a scheme to direct illegitimate Republican electors to submit false documents certifying the election for Trump in seven states that Trump lost. And he spread baseless conspiracy theories about nonexistent election fraud for months on end. [He should be prohibited from ever practicing law again.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2888e368-d506-44bd-b31d-061e571f60aa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) So it’s welcome news that an attorney disciplinary committee decided that Giuliani’s false election fraud claims should make him liable for professional sanctions. But this decision is preliminary and non-binding – and Giuliani will have to face additional rounds of hearings. And those running those hearings need to know that Rudy needs to face harsh penalties, not just a slap on the wrist. We’ve had enough of Rudy Giuliani and his antics – he can’t be let off the hook. He must be held accountable for his lies about the 2020 election! [Sign the petition: Demand sanctions against Rudy Giuliani >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta620ac7b-b5aa-4d52-953e-a2b329ded828/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Kadida Kenner
subject: No off-years, fellow activist
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project_
body:
Expanding the electorate is year-round work.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/56012955/383584837/-1069438538?refcode=EM_FR_221215OffYears_N_KK_90DO_4_NG_A_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY2NDA3MjJiLWMyN2MtZWQxMS05ZDdhLTAwMGQzYTllYjkxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OC_bIltLhE_dFMGr1g0SqjSXtwaNsFlgLzyjUIpakuY=)
| Fellow activist, there is no such thing as an off-year, particularly for organizers and mobilizers. We’ll be out expanding the electorate all year, every year, because Pennsylvania will have several crucial elections on the ballot in 2023, including State Supreme Court, mayoral races and special legislative elections.

Given the close partisan balance in both of these bodies, every one of these elections could have huge implications for the Commonwealth. We will be focusing on civic education around the local, municipal and judicial elections, and continuing to build power within the communities we center to expand the electorate in 2023 as we lead up to 2024.

**[Yet we’re just halfway through the last month of 2022, and we’re already seeing the beginning of a massive fundraising slump, fellow activist. After all our expenses on Georgia’s runoff election, that’s a big problem. Will you donate $10 right now to help us get back on track to our $10,000 end-of-year goal and continue our year-round organizing to expand the clean_body: Expanding the electorate is year-round work. = | Fellow activist, there is no such thing as an off-year, particularly for organizers and mobilizers. We’ll be out expanding the electorate all year, every year, because Pennsylvania will have several crucial elections on the ballot in 2023, including State Supreme Court, mayoral races and special legislative elections. Given the close partisan balance in both of these bodies, every one of these elections could have huge implications for the Commonwealth. We will be focusing on civic education around the local, municipal and judicial elections, and continuing to build power within the communities we center to expand the electorate in 2023 as we lead up to 2024. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Kadida Kenner Chief Executive Officer The New Pennsylvania Project = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. We register communities to vote, provide civic education about the issues that matter in their neighborhoods, and mobilize Pennsylvanians to vote in every election. = PA ELECTION DATES : PRIMARY: May 2023, TBD GENERAL: November 7, 2023 || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: A new conservative movement
body:
I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, How We Win -- just in time for Christmas!
| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2mnq9oktd5sofocf2n6pqo8m9qlaedjoprfc1ug_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chj60o74cph2bs)
---
Fellow Patriot, I want to send you a FREE copy of my newest book, _How We Win_ \-- just in time for Christmas! **While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of _ANY AMOUNT_ to Turning Point USA.**
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zoh8fprk9blr0avdrkb5v55m3l2i3p9k19tlphe8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chj60o74cph2bs)
---
[**Just click here to make your gift and claim your copy before it's gone!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0f9q9pr4rj4h608r6su492cd4jopqurtbbs14vg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chj60o74cph2bs)
---
[Get my book](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zpvoge9nkdufuhd9ls3r0j6739ksrhp7n8rvgflg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chj60o74cph2bs)
---
Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zrlnth2a4le0mokmdb0s7b6ah3rbodgt7d1cvd0o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chj60o74cph2bs) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2jff0r2gs5q5fsa33htuc3no633r71n4f5tf62o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chj60o74cph2bs)
---
[Get my book](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmfh1ge8m9jciasn94njhsvlr3kui1k0f8poktpg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chj60o74cph2bs)
---
Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We’re helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. [**It all starts when you claim your copy of How We Win -- which can be YOURS for a gift of any amount today!**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7dfcqlgiltb4qvl0obenltchpe2ahrrh1rl3mjg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chj60o74cph2bs)
---
| | [Get my book ](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv1p7obs3big0cn9kfgdtvgpqr634rdlskmttbi8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chj60o74cph2bs)
---
For America,
---
Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA
---
---
4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---

How We Win is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will FIGHT for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. How We Win is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come. And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just talking about saving America... ... we're DOING IT! With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We’re helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. | | For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

| Hello,

Sponsored by Delegate John McGuire Virginia State Senate District 10 Candidate

This is your opportunity to join our efforts, by becoming a VCDL University member! Join us Dec 21st for the VCDL-U Kickoff Event! Meet Philip Van Cleave, President of VCDL, Britton Ross, and Al Evans to learn about our NEW STUDENT Program. Mission BBQ Lunch will be provided.

December 21, 2022 9:00A.M. -1:00 P.M.

subject: Special Elections are tricky
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
We must hold on to this seat

|
---
Derek, Special elections are tricky to predict. **History tells us that we shouldn’t take them for granted** \- with Democrats barely winning or even outright losing in _“safe”_ districts across the Commonwealth and our nation. No matter who ends up as our nominee in VA-04, we must have the resources to keep this seat blue in February! [**Can we count on you to chip in and keep VA-04 in Democratic hands?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56018471/383588792/-110221735?refcode=dpva-em-221215-VA-04&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTM4ZTgzMC1jNzdjLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nyyq-fDfWgILNQt67C8OL2rLd0gw-QnIdYMbJAou8ys=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: We must hold on to this seat | Derek, Special elections are tricky to predict. History tells us that we shouldn’t take them for granted \- with Democrats barely winning or even outright losing in “safe” districts across the Commonwealth and our nation. No matter who ends up as our nominee in VA-04, we must have the resources to keep this seat blue in February! = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ********=****** ******=****** ******=****** ******=****** Once the winner of the Firehouse Caucus on December 20th has been decided, we will need to do everything we can to keep this seat. This special election will come down to mobilizing our base to turn out on February 21st, and educating voters in the 4th District about the election. We need your help to do that - Can we count on you to keep VA-04 Blue? = — Team DPVA =****** =******** [content goes here] Democratic Party of Virginia PO Box 448 Richmond, VA 23218 United States Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www.vademocrats.org. As we celebrate the holiday season, I’m grateful for you.

We accomplished a lot this year: **Defeating a Big Lie, anti‐Choice extremist and bringing much‐needed new leadership to Southwest Ohio.**

We did it together.

I’m eager to get started in the New Year, but first, I want to thank just a few of the donors who helped make this possible: _**Renee in Springboro** who chipped in $10
**Scott in Cincinnati** who gave $25
**Martha in Norwood** who gave $50_ This work is not possible without supporters like Renee, Scott, Martha (and you!) chipping in what they can, when they can.

name: Official Democratic Headquarters
subject: One lesson from 2022…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
With Republicans attempting to do everything in their power to restrict access to the ballot box, the DNC has been investing in crucial voter protection programs, but we need your help to power our work. | |
---
Derek, 2022 was a banner year for Democrats. But as the Director of Civic Engagement and Voter Protection at the DNC, I’d be remiss if I didn’t make one thing clear: **Democrats won in the face of Republicans’ efforts to limit the right to vote.** The DNC has been investing in crucial voter protection programs to ensure every eligible person gets to exercise their freedom to vote. Grassroots donors like you made my team’s work possible for the midterm elections. But protecting the freedom to vote demands continued investment, Derek. **That’s why we’re asking this team to support the DNC’s Voter Protection Fund. I’m asking you to chip in $7 to this fund for the first time. Anything you’re able to give will help protect the right to vote and elect Democrats across the country.**

With the support of this grassroots team, the DNC made historic investments in voter protection, including:
* **Investing early in voter protection nationwide:** Working with our sister committees and state parties, Democrats had Voter Protection Directors in 25 states and more than 100 total voter protection staff on the ground. Investing early meant that voter protection teams were in position to advocate for accessible early voting sites; to review and identify problematic ballot designs in time to advocate for better designs; and to develop working relationships with local election officials, whose work is essential to the sound administration of the election.

* **Creating a comprehensive set of tools and services to assist voters directly and support state voter protection programs:** From IWillVote.com’s one-stop shop for voting questions to The National Voter Assistance Hotline and Accessibility Textline, the DNC made it a priority to provide clear, easily accessible information for voters across the country.

* **Litigating to protect voters and the election system:** The DNC successfully defended state election laws providing for early and mail voting against Republican challenge, including in Arizona and Pennsylvania. We also litigated in Pennsylvania and Wisconsin to ensure that voters casting mail ballots have the opportunity to correct errors in returning those ballots and to ensure that minor errors are not a basis to throw out the ballots of eligible voters.

But with GOP lawmakers not showing any signs of slowing down their attacks on the right to vote, we can’t afford to take our foot off the gas either. **Every penny raised for the Voter Protection Fund will go toward voter education, registration, technology, and more to protect the right to vote and elect Democrats nationwide.** **[So please, rush a $7 contribution to the DNC’s Voter Protection Fund today. Whatever you can afford to give will make a big difference in our fight to defend our democracy and elect Democrats nationwide.](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wtF81Kr_XOYfXS47DM_ccJbnL55fY7Cq_W-vNm00MxT8KzOnN_wxklX9jjAkGtwjA4ebFwvzkzLKRLeAhQcazaB0josub73p5DjcU-EcjegAKOVL90P6ErR0lwtdRqQ6x5xKiQWkqbHqvg_KEVCccUA0JZtJ5o23HXBg3SwnkUzvQwayBVG1vPlIO--P37pj69aZecpSj9WX1qJK5Dx_NmdD8LW7ljBp3IbWQP5SVJya-DCE_YLK7Wa2sETTyOEQtzpjFfWIJBo6kY8BS3ZKc-UpGr0wWq66eOSxQQVfc7WOMnWihMISIRXWKk3BPWASAG_nI2ShQ8SKOMgCWjWGz_pNluZwqHHnGn6qjk9sK3WRu4p7We4TGHlDDTeWMx7WBVqCgIKfT4CaNXJA-lKdrPPRruUSQqlD1oTZoX7QaWGaUakjPAKAn3semGnZzMGvbeodvJYKeg-TO2vW12Ac7fxuxqErcaf2lq4bzF5xx54hdogfQbpC1CDulJDp7L28dG_Z7uH07NZIUacgbYd3zp/3s0/6uawaKlDTT2SkdUmyd8fGQ/h6/8t4r0T6PT9drxIjg9H-Sn9A2ycehwEvK3mmQ6QS0LVo)** Thank you for all that you do, Reyna Reyna Walters-Morgan

clean_body: With Republicans attempting to do everything in their power to restrict access to the ballot box, the DNC has been investing in crucial voter protection programs, but we need your help to power our work. | | Derek, 2022 was a banner year for Democrats. But as the Director of Civic Engagement and Voter Protection at the DNC, I’d be remiss if I didn’t make one thing clear: Democrats won in the face of Republicans’ efforts to limit the right to vote. The DNC has been investing in crucial voter protection programs to ensure every eligible person gets to exercise their freedom to vote. Grassroots donors like you made my team’s work possible for the midterm elections. But protecting the freedom to vote demands continued investment, Derek. That’s why we’re asking this team to support the DNC’s Voter Protection Fund. I’m asking you to chip in $7 to this fund for the first time. Anything you’re able to give will help protect the right to vote and elect Democrats across the country. With the support of this grassroots team, the DNC made historic investments in voter protection, including: Investing early in voter protection nationwide: Working with our sister committees and state parties, Democrats had Voter Protection Directors in 25 states and more than 100 total voter protection staff on the ground. Investing early meant that voter protection teams were in position to advocate for accessible early voting sites; to review and identify problematic ballot designs in time to advocate for better designs; and to develop working relationships with local election officials, whose work is essential to the sound administration of the election. Creating a comprehensive set of tools and services to assist voters directly and support state voter protection programs: From IWillVote.com’s one-stop shop for voting questions to The National Voter Assistance Hotline and Accessibility Textline, the DNC made it a priority to provide clear, easily accessible information for voters across the country. Litigating to protect voters and the election system: The DNC successfully defended state election laws providing for early and mail voting against Republican challenge, including in Arizona and Pennsylvania. We also litigated in Pennsylvania and Wisconsin to ensure that voters casting mail ballots have the opportunity to correct errors in returning those ballots and to ensure that minor errors are not a basis to throw out the ballots of eligible voters. But with GOP lawmakers not showing any signs of slowing down their attacks on the right to vote, we can’t afford to take our foot off the gas either. Every penny raised for the Voter Protection Fund will go toward voter education, registration, technology, and more to protect the right to vote and elect Democrats nationwide. Thank you for all that you do, Reyna Reyna Walters-Morgan Director of Civic Engagement and Voter Protection Democratic National Committee Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . ---
Friend,
The Bill of Rights Day is to celebrate and commemorate the freedoms that are enshrined in the first 10 amendments to the United States Constitution. These amendments, which were added to the Constitution in 1791, protect the fundamental rights and liberties of American citizens, including the freedoms of speech, religion, to keep and bear arms, as well as the right to a fair and speedy trial. The Bill of Rights ensures that all Americans are treated equally under the law and are able to enjoy the freedoms and opportunities that make our country great.

As we celebrate the Bill of Rights Day, let us remember the sacrifices and struggles of those who fought for these rights, and recommit to protecting and preserving them for future generations.

-Team Hageman

clean_body: | | | | | Friend, The Bill of Rights Day is to celebrate and commemorate the freedoms that are enshrined in the first 10 amendments to the United States Constitution. These amendments, which were added to the Constitution in 1791, protect the fundamental rights and liberties of American citizens, including the freedoms of speech, religion, to keep and bear arms, as well as the right to a fair and speedy trial. The Bill of Rights ensures that all Americans are treated equally under the law and are able to enjoy the freedoms and opportunities that make our country great. As we celebrate the Bill of Rights Day, let us remember the sacrifices and struggles of those who fought for these rights, and recommit to protecting and preserving them for future generations. -Team Hageman | | | |

Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... **...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of _How We Win_ to be so _URGENT_ and so _IMPORTANT_ that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible.** [**I hope you'll make your gift to Turning Point USA right now and claim your copy of _How We Win_ before it's gone. Let me tell you -- these books are flying out of our warehouse!**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c4314840916a4610aa28541a1fe63180&_e=4ACszmljrYIHALjPXCfrzP_IMcwqLAP3PWnEte395ec7_UNeAC526tVfKXi9m2g5LoMxf_3_uSXZLlg-7Dyda1E8DamcrBXklBy5LdIdtuBNxyU_4oj22kzMpfJhhVM7pTbJ5FdB2vcqCzpkBFVVtgbpRItDAjq6zZtk0y92DcDfGEaIRVFQG8xRh9zrAkDU4bb7Hme2dtgZebwJ7NtcOcEBLvmah48GFMaGz5hSDOGjjaXWHO0KlUdSlKouZthK5pEoB8tNtGwCqH8ipJK3DlnkN-sNhIZKfU8oT7s2KwM%3D) _How We Win_ is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will _FIGHT_ for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. **_How We Win_ is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come.** And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! [**Please -- if you haven't claimed your copy already, click here to get it now.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c4314840916a4610aa28541a1fe63180&_e=4ACszmljrYIHALjPXCfrzP_IMcwqLAP3PWnEte395ec7_UNeAC526tVfKXi9m2g5LoMxf_3_uSXZLlg-7Dyda1E8DamcrBXklBy5LdIdtuBNxyU_4oj22kzMpfJhhVM7pTbJ5FdB2vcqCzpkBFVVtl2pbseIg_zELTrIYtm3qompxo1Vv3hW9I5zW9mJgVoY3yHAOmK0yfVinFScA2623TzLot5sCz3m1MWPKa-NrrhTDTh3PYAblA7iPMUH4aZclnYI7kWZQiEFFiohWNlO4L2ga2q8Ofd9qfAnREqaTd8%3D)

[Get my book](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c4314840916a4610aa28541a1fe63180&_e=4ACszmljrYIHALjPXCfrzP_IMcwqLAP3PWnEte395ec7_UNeAC526tVfKXi9m2g5LoMxf_3_uSXZLlg-7Dyda1E8DamcrBXklBy5LdIdtuBNxyU_4oj22kzMpfJhhVM7pTbJ5FdB2vcqCzpkBFVVtv2rtuM1lARutDqN9zcSB13QZTyHIT_V331sAlTcEtNqtEpQFx2CyhVZo4LdXsr6_oqyF_rVN_tKi2RAZ41BFT-OlIJK1509j82Kc0jqTG27f2noEtzbuj080OpkJTBCxPlk2t93SdBHG14CVGhVyq8%3D)

Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just _talking_ about saving America... **... we're _DOING IT!_** With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We're helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. [**It all starts when you claim your copy of How We Win -- which can be YOURS for a gift of any amount today!**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c4314840916a4610aa28541a1fe63180&_e=4ACszmljrYIHALjPXCfrzP_IMcwqLAP3PWnEte395ec7_UNeAC526tVfKXi9m2g5LoMxf_3_uSXZLlg-7Dyda1E8DamcrBXklBy5LdIdtuBNxyU_4oj22kzMpfJhhVM7pTbJ5FdB2vcqCzpkBFVVttjWqTEkyFD78WboieDXRJXDg5QgpyOxYd-7JExx8kgFNYJftBjeras0BClHGLXyxr4UM0E6rFb4_xMW59YPdCyTdNgVgPPYyF6bzLJAFOFC4wKs-WBU3ueUwvHF961sOuM2Tx5idr7Rji719wmYdYo%3D)
