While supplies last, you can get a copy of this brand-new book to give to a conservative friend or family member (or to add to your personal library) when you make a gift of ANY AMOUNT to Turning Point USA. Until now, Turning Point USA has been giving this book away as a thank-you gift for donations of $100 or more... ...but generous TPUSA supporters found the message of How We Win to be so URGENT and so IMPORTANT that they're helping me get it into the hands of as many grassroots patriots as possible. How We Win is my prescription for a new conservative movement that will SAVE America once and for all. You see, after TEN YEARS at the helm of Turning Point USA... ... TEN YEARS criss-crossing the country... ... TEN YEARS engaging with the good, the bad, and the ugly on college campuses... ... I have come to the conclusion that the time has passed where conservatives can hope to simply persuade liberal radicals to come around to our way of thinking. That simply isn't going to happen. We must become a movement that's unafraid to stand up for what's right... a movement that's done pulling punches and will FIGHT for the moral and philosophical foundations that have made our nation the greatest in the history of the world. How We Win is my handbook for how we can become that movement -- and how we can secure victories for American Greatness that will last for generations to come. And this special book can be YOURS for a gift of ANY AMOUNT today! Even a gift of just $5 will help us ship the book to you and get this vitally important knowledge into the hands of patriots all across America. And best of all, when you make a generous gift today, you can rest assured that you're doing more than just getting a book. You're investing in the most powerful conservative youth organization in America. You see, with over 500,000 patriotic high school and college students on over 3,000 campuses nationwide, TPUSA isn't just talking about saving America... ... we're DOING IT! With the partnership of friends like you, we're helping high school and college students love America again. We're helping to restore patriotism and love of country as a way of life for hundreds of thousands of young Americans every year and changing the trajectory of a generation. This is your invitation to participate in that nation-saving work, my friend. | | For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044 Sent to Conservative Liberty Wire subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

subject: The 2023 Pathway to Victory Daily Devotional is here
body:
| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0b5cc8d5e8684a05bae26dddb34452d2&_e=pQujzxkRgymDkLMkDgQ6IiT_qdN9CdDaYUUsp48DUqm7My8un2MFdS6z-f4emK9REvdRefZDU5G9uJNM62CHVy_Wt6HWh312YBQehRdfUxHU-uPxv3pW7JS-W353bwqDXWpAhbZnjptMW_zKwLlgx1N2Wpu4cMCBLuTBMQ1ngIawzGhysAPDzKqUY0P57HrLOyyh674UPI24-Z2wifQcGTyr3arSHr3bt4KeN84bV3n3ypd9CfVsqZQ5WUICO83agDtfdSLzLJnu93lCcEv7yAWperrgHmzkAVMSgPIgkbQir772am4X8uUxN1ygvfHl2EtkYht2Aoq43u9EfbG4DaeM6yeWD1xKXJSu42jkck2slxcQ3ZkdTezggFfWrrm1)
---
Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That's why I've written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we'll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* From January to February, we'll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we'll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we'll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we'll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---
[Request your 2023 Daily Devotional](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0b5cc8d5e8684a05bae26dddb34452d2&_e=pQujzxkRgymDkLMkDgQ6IiT_qdN9CdDaYUUsp48DUqm7My8un2MFdS6z-f4emK9REvdRefZDU5G9uJNM62CHVy_Wt6HWh312YBQehRdfUxHU-uPxv3pW7JS-W353bwqDXWpAhbZnjptMW_zKwLlgx1N2Wpu4cMCBLuTBMQ1ngIawzGhysAPDzKqUY0P57HrLOyyh674UPI24-Z2wifQcGTyr3arSHr3bt4KeN84bV3mcJ8T-dQemV-uuevgHmKj0G_T1777rZbgvIN4WCATL5uhi1-9oh-ojS4JnLpzmyDvceaWJgnrsEbXPDVDDk3GjYkmG2qdGH7_e4k8UaxL3zKwdIGx7EJWnv6f_TWHbqbXoowYo71KGitjjSyc1CN-o)
---
| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0b5cc8d5e8684a05bae26dddb34452d2&_e=pQujzxkRgymDkLMkDgQ6IiT_qdN9CdDaYUUsp48DUqm7My8un2MFdS6z-f4emK9REvdRefZDU5G9uJNM62CHVy_Wt6HWh312YBQehRdfUxHU-uPxv3pW7JS-W353bwqDXWpAhbZnjptMW_zKwLlgx1N2Wpu4cMCBLuTBMQ1ngIawzGhysAPDzKqUY0P57HrLOyyh674UPI24-Z2wifQcGTyr3arSHr3bt4KeN84bV3kz-328pU2uMiUVLPDjSLsPeXeP8unutuySgRLRUKD7jEDG5ZCyHf4W_SBjbTOkNKiExWJRQPk_uID7hEfbEJ3g9g_wAAsPSBPf85TkS-CP6n0rb2th2USDQ1kd--_EHG_g3pu74YtNlvOIUSTkgkM_)

---
| | We're offering this devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ this month. **And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31.** To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/light-in-the-darkness-matching-challenge/](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0b5cc8d5e8684a05bae26dddb34452d2&_e=pQujzxkRgymDkLMkDgQ6IiT_qdN9CdDaYUUsp48DUqm7My8un2MFdS6z-f4emK9REvdRefZDU5G9uJNM62CHVy_Wt6HWh312YBQehRdfUxHU-uPxv3pW7JS-W353bwqDXWpAhbZnjptMW_zKwLlgx1N2Wpu4cMCBLuTBMQ1ngIawzGhysAPDzKqUY0P57HrLOyyh674UPI24-Z2wifQcGTyr3arSHr3bt4KeN84bV3kOX0n_sz93HeVIYPXrdB37WH1NVtY0-EaERp97DIRdsDZ_YA71ZJo65RMTga1jlyDC5g-7-aY-J4ng696IZt2rxJaWRuA9sE80QLxXn78B5N636j8B9Gh4oAoXPeishmdhrHdgg29krVd6ikMnU9a3) What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? name: Wayne LaPierre
subject: The Left is planning widespread gun confiscation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Rifle Association of America
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62081986:6Mr2UVG1N:m:1:3253819041:A341641C271B680EB4A131FEE7BBB772:r)

Peter,

If the radical gun-grabbers in Washington get their way...

_**Your firearms could be CONFISCATED.**_
_**Your ammunition could be BANNED.**_
_**The Second Amendment could be REPEALED.**_

We are not exaggerating, Peter. Gun-control extremists are LITERALLY plotting to take away your Constitutional rights as we speak.

The best way we can protect the Second Amendment from tyrannical government overreach is by making sure Constitutional Carry is instituted in EVERY state. It's going to take ALL OF US to get it done.

**[Take a stand and support CONSTITUTIONAL CARRY by contributing ANY AMOUNT to the National Rifle Association before midnight tonight.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62081987:6Mr2UVG1N:m:1:3253819041:A341641C271B680EB4A131FEE7BBB772:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62081986:6Mr2UVG1N:m:1:3253819041:A341641C271B680EB4A131FEE7BBB772:r)

The data is clear: The American People want the ability to defend themselves. More Americans than EVER are seeking carry permits, _**but corrupt politicians in Washington are ramping up their gun-grabbing efforts in response.**_

If we don't act now, we might lose our Constitutional gun rights FOREVER. It's truly now or never, Peter.

**[Contribute ANY AMOUNT to the National Rifle Association to help PROTECT THE SECOND AMENDMENT against the gun-grabbers in Washington.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62081987:6Mr2UVG1N:m:1:3253819041:A341641C271B680EB4A131FEE7BBB772:r)**

Thank you,

Wayne LaPierre
Executive Vice President, National Rifle Association

**[CONTRIBUTE NOW»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62081986:6Mr2UVG1N:m:1:3253819041:A341641C271B680EB4A131FEE7BBB772:r)**

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Your invitation to learn
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history.
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zcgm5m4cepo4d5i3jh6kn4sslffpbeinbfp7cv08_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chgmaob2clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. They’ve shaken me, and I’m sure they’ve affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** —not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I’d like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, “ _The Federalist Papers_ ,”on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It’s taught by Hillsdale’s knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation’s founding principles of liberty. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zt82f3qd66tq7uvhr628i9mqhert32khod0l3mt8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chgmaob2clh2bs) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_“The Federalist Papers”_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won’t last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**“The Federalist Papers”**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z3ik1gkn1mnach48hkfgbrbh86767i6suv83kmk8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4chgmaob2clh2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2zaamtc4v50cvhtj86803jafq6nlksveuio1o8mqo).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zrk4nubfl61tjp4mh82kpu0jtm2a34he7ocdi180_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or7chi62pb1c9im49fg)

Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester has stayed committed to uplifting the voices of our voters and protecting their fundamental rights, but without backup, her strides are in danger.

In this year’s midterms, Delawareans proved this is a strong blue state, but we can’t take our position for granted. With narrow margins in both chambers of Congress, we have to continue our fight to ensure that our promises to the American people don’t fall flat.

Lisa has been hard at work this past year, closing tax loopholes for wealthy corporations, lowering healthcare costs for seniors, creating new jobs for Delaware and decreasing the national deficit, but there’s still so much more to achieve. That’s why we need all the resources we can get to continue supporting these endeavors and create new ones in the coming year. **[Implementing policies that put the people front and center is at the top of Lisa’s list. clean_body: Creating the change our country needs requires continuous efforts from our elected officials and grassroot supports like you. = = The clock is winding down. We are in the final hours of our last mid-month deadline of 2022, and right now, we’re still $621 away from our goal. = = Creating the change our country needs requires continuous effort from our elected officials and grassroots supporters. Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester has stayed committed to uplifting the voices of our voters and protecting their fundamental rights, but without backup, her strides are in danger. In this year’s midterms, Delawareans proved this is a strong blue state, but we can’t take our position for granted. With narrow margins in both chambers of Congress, we have to continue our fight to ensure that our promises to the American people don’t fall flat. Lisa has been hard at work this past year, closing tax loopholes for wealthy corporations, lowering healthcare costs for seniors, creating new jobs for Delaware and decreasing the national deficit, but there’s still so much more to achieve. That’s why we need all the resources we can get to continue supporting these endeavors and create new ones in the coming year. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | **= | | = | = | | = | = | | = Our work is not done yet, Team LBR Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. subject: the "v word"
body:
|
---
| | Do you know about the "v-word?"

It gets thrown around a lot when people are talking about educational freedom (aka "school choice").

But a lot of folks... don't really understand it.

So as you could imagine, I jumped at the chance to chime in when **[a reporter asked me for my thoughts on it](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=56b67992ed&e=dea908e0fe "what is the v word???")**.

Because trapping kids in failing government schools... _isn't working._

And it's time to do the right thing _for the students_(not "the system").

So, if you'd like...

**[Check out the article that just dropped](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=99a697f826&e=dea908e0fe "the v word??")**

And please let me know what you think.

Cheers,

Brian

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023?
body:
As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=16e883af8f3c45e9b7b55ff646663a0e&_e=YuNtxVDaaa03POM-QgcFkiQADZb-e1ButHvQo-yXGGSX5Kkx3HxkZiiN3Q4hQ7ZM4X96YS4CZKckjRmyQyVIlcLMvpigMv8guJ7c-ngpfke8iYY4aC3djvkRA8CYsgs0xXq7-zQR_0yZ2l5AkBYx8zrEXn2OkVaLoBUOkl00VwdFY5cV-e3nS6ukVqIMIxtCxGqpKiDH8xdAkqauoF9Pt1-URYmJmyNBNwndWB_jUcmFCd4NaIURvtaDDOyXDBi1QTg7-beYJsOmyrRpHaJkC5opwmt7DAJdYItpjAN5WytlJ5Hi_PT2lkCuSvtoeaUUIZziWZ3MPv6_mxHntzMBSGbzM5Cvg0JfBYKasVLp9Bram488k24JzpbV7_1rKHs7)
---
Hello Friend, As 2022 comes to an end, I am thinking about how I can help you make 2023 a landmark year in your Christian walk. I want to help you grow closer to Jesus all year long, so that you, in turn, can impact the world around you. That's why I've written the brand-new 2023 _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional. It contains 260 devotions (Monday through Friday for all 52 weeks) written to encourage, inspire, convict, comfort, and teach you biblical truth so that you can face each day with spiritual readiness. Here is an outline of what we'll be studying together if you choose to follow along:
---
* From January to February, we'll begin a spiritual fitness program using wisdom from the book of Hebrews.
* From March through May, we'll learn how to walk with God by faith in our everyday lives by studying the life of Abraham.
* In the summer, we'll gain a biblical understanding of grace, and discover the joy and freedom of living obediently.
* And in the fall and winter, we'll meditate together on the parables of Jesus!

---
[Request your 2023 Daily Devotional](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=16e883af8f3c45e9b7b55ff646663a0e&_e=YuNtxVDaaa03POM-QgcFkiQADZb-e1ButHvQo-yXGGSX5Kkx3HxkZiiN3Q4hQ7ZM4X96YS4CZKckjRmyQyVIlcLMvpigMv8guJ7c-ngpfke8iYY4aC3djvkRA8CYsgs0xXq7-zQR_0yZ2l5AkBYx8zrEXn2OkVaLoBUOkl00VwdFY5cV-e3nS6ukVqIMIxtCxGqpKiDH8xdAkqauoF9Pt1-URYmJmyNBNwndWB_jUckN_f5VC562WMff4InX-iBjONJWhfFVYbvc3vz91Ay8zBSg8b1R9qw0uUkjdKx9jfF3NdzJ1IVX-ILGsz85aR8oAvwbPs5Ep95QTheVlaG8Yu7ln-2AySPgwUgYZk-QQGzc4GnZ-lsYiScbtodxFviB)
---

---
| The _Pathway to Victory_ Daily Devotional is one of the most popular resources we offer, and it makes a perfect Christmas gift. With a slate-blue leather cover and inlaid rich brown and gold foil, this beautiful devotional is built to be used daily, providing spiritual nourishment for your day.
---
| | We're offering this devotional as a thank-you gift to those who donate to _Pathway to Victory_ this month. **And the best part is, whatever donation you make will be doubled in its impact thanks to the matching gift challenge that is running until December 31.** To support the work God is doing through _Pathway to Victory_ , and to receive your beautiful copy of the devotional, you can use this link: [https://ptv.org/donate/light-in-the-darkness-matching-challenge/](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=16e883af8f3c45e9b7b55ff646663a0e&_e=YuNtxVDaaa03POM-QgcFkiQADZb-e1ButHvQo-yXGGSX5Kkx3HxkZiiN3Q4hQ7ZM4X96YS4CZKckjRmyQyVIlcLMvpigMv8guJ7c-ngpfke8iYY4aC3djvkRA8CYsgs0xXq7-zQR_0yZ2l5AkBYx8zrEXn2OkVaLoBUOkl00VwdFY5cV-e3nS6ukVqIMIxtCxGqpKiDH8xdAkqauoF9Pt1-URYmJmyNBNwndWB_jUcnwoesmfBpOsb9afRF2IN7vYx-b6TAWxJwG2wcGC-sEntrXYy0cSYuEvfElOMasnNINw6gLNtlbDTGLfh7j6VlVo9-DqeE4A8abI0FgZK_LPBNazqO7rR-13u250MMQg1b1oRPT3fgk_7jR5VkY50lf) What if we all committed to spending more time with Jesus in 2023? What do you think we would accomplish? I'm excited to find out. Thanks for your partnership with this ministry. Sharing the Truth of God's Word, Dr. Robert Jeffress

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: As a nation we have turned slowly away
body:
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a864d8c0f20243f8828f0521aacaaf68&_e=xQ-mB24QgkivuYYGnuHF6DLLxt9TSQhdYE2HUhRx64VYDjB2UOQcehIVi7cFYf1FSv2LsAYDOl1PPQ7MvxkZ2MFzvZkzcfLb_LTGtBWsRcZclOloHC8Dyfs2DhauEY_bzu5893elLzmtzc12VZ7cf4VIYBOnAl3HckqufBCRkbpF7K-mMt0tgU6zgIEbTMceCMUEviILPpX4Lt06cpMY8GJpyV9ZrM1a4quoQ29_gox5qvsjUppDAr_dOEL17O6ESFKl6cPkS0FHnU060itFkjXc4l8sxa1ZBSpI8ImJknjH_8Z7qjDGrm_zgcV7wD7BtHJEfs-ydhbXGtBhVDk7IA-fKI443cK9c8ziyuXAIoZ5xkx2-pC4LabYgzWlbjIHpL2VRXTeRsuaqH6z1ha6Dw%3D%3D)
---
Hello, Revisionists of America’s history would have you believe that our nation was founded on secular grounds and that “a great wall of separation between Church and State” has been our guiding principle since the beginning. They would have you believe that our founders wanted Christianity to be completely absent from all forms and institutions of government. The truth of the matter is that, over time, we have allowed secularists, humanists, atheists, and infidels to pervert our Constitution into something our founding fathers never intended. Take a look at this quote from Benjamin Franklin, who wasn’t even a Christian. He was a Deist:

_“I have lived . . . a long time, and the longer I live, the more convincing proofs I see of this truth—that God governs in the affairs of men. And if a sparrow cannot fall to the ground without his notice, is it probable that an empire can rise without his aid? We have been assured . . . in the sacred writings, that ‘except the Lord build the House they labour in vain that build it.’”_

In fact, it was Ben Franklin who suggested that the Constitutional Convention should seek God’s blessing in an opening prayer at every session!

When I think about truths like this and contrast them with the utter contempt for and avoidance of any semblance of Christian thought by today’s governing leaders, I am both amazed and disgusted.
---
| | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a864d8c0f20243f8828f0521aacaaf68&_e=xQ-mB24QgkivuYYGnuHF6DLLxt9TSQhdYE2HUhRx64VYDjB2UOQcehIVi7cFYf1FSv2LsAYDOl1PPQ7MvxkZ2MFzvZkzcfLb_LTGtBWsRcZclOloHC8Dyfs2DhauEY_bzu5893elLzmtzc12VZ7cf4VIYBOnAl3HckqufBCRkbpF7K-mMt0tgU6zgIEbTMceCMUEviILPpX4Lt06cpMY8GJpyV9ZrM1a4quoQ29_gox5qvsjUppDAr_dOEL17O6E2nK7BAN2GCNuZD30pLyqivDnFBCgEHkfG6WwLIBr_6steekPq_xGvvBjmzUJH1urCNMQG04ZdHo8NoAE4gU5rREGb2reeDTnqKduujh0C9x70d4spUmr-ODE5NPh5tFoyKtpyNX_Gzzbdn0Q7soyLg%3D%3D)
---
As a nation, we have turned slowly away from the God who “governs the affairs of men” and relied instead on our own understanding. Look where it has got us:
---
* Since the Roe v Wade ruling in 1973, an average of 600,000 babies have been murdered in the womb each year.
* As of 2018, gun violence is the leading cause of death for children and teens.
* Every year, excessive drinking is responsible for the deaths of more than 3,500 people under the legal drinking age.
* We’ve pushed God out of our classrooms, courtrooms, and living rooms—and we are reaping the consequences.

---
What’s the solution? We as a nation must invite Him back in. That starts with changing individual hearts and lives. And that change can only come about through the proclamation of God’s Word.
---
[Sign the pledge to stand for Christian values in America](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a864d8c0f20243f8828f0521aacaaf68&_e=xQ-mB24QgkivuYYGnuHF6DLLxt9TSQhdYE2HUhRx64VYDjB2UOQcehIVi7cFYf1FSv2LsAYDOl1PPQ7MvxkZ2MFzvZkzcfLb_LTGtBWsRcZclOloHC8Dyfs2DhauEY_bzu5893elLzmtzc12VZ7cf4VIYBOnAl3HckqufBCRkbpF7K-mMt0tgU6zgIEbTMceCMUEviILPpX4Lt06cpMY8GJpyV9ZrM1a4quoQ29_gox5qvsjUppDAr_dOEL17O6EUsSQUu3aRGNKqAzyrOnKUE6O_kH2U6UOtg5Wrv96NeJar3cd5HgiPBwRVLVadw5fP5CYvkzI6xTCNZkJVptvsQc_omWEu3cHE_XK_fku3TKGoSNorZvGi7GyxUzL1EzwwPhC6_JoSk5HesyQgp9odg%3D%3D)
---
If you are ready to be counted among those who wish to live the true Christian life without hesitation or apology, I invite you to sign a pledge resolving to do so. This pledge, created by the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_ , is a simple way to show that you stand with us and believe that America is a Christian nation. Change can and will take place when we as believers take our faith seriously. **[Will you stand shoulder to shoulder with me and pledge to stand for Christian values in America?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a864d8c0f20243f8828f0521aacaaf68&_e=xQ-mB24QgkivuYYGnuHF6DLLxt9TSQhdYE2HUhRx64VYDjB2UOQcehIVi7cFYf1FSv2LsAYDOl1PPQ7MvxkZ2MFzvZkzcfLb_LTGtBWsRcZclOloHC8Dyfs2DhauEY_bzu5893elLzmtzc12VZ7cf4VIYBOnAl3HckqufBCRkbpF7K-mMt0tgU6zgIEbTMceCMUEviILPpX4Lt06cpMY8GJpyV9ZrM1a4quoQ29_gox5qvsjUppDAr_dOEL17O6EOyUtHp8BIAy58Jan2i2tzGXYvN5Y7KmXM39402dNsX-RX8M93Zf8F1rzGuDB0bUcTMG6CbQyAfm-HUBVk1KvaFIonnB6K_ZKGExWqMGGbKpSvcw-2WmEdUA-btrbd7gcOWBDR3exwK_xthANBy23TQ%3D%3D)** There is hope for the future of America—and it starts with a firm resolve to shine the light of Jesus Christ.

Sharing the Truth of God’s Word,
Dr. Robert Jeffress
---

Take a look at this quote from Benjamin Franklin, who wasn’t even a Christian. He was a Deist: “I have lived . . . a long time, and the longer I live, the more convincing proofs I see of this truth—that God governs in the affairs of men. And if a sparrow cannot fall to the ground without his notice, is it probable that an empire can rise without his aid? We have been assured . . . in the sacred writings, that ‘except the Lord build the House they labour in vain that build it.’” In fact, it was Ben Franklin who suggested that the Constitutional Convention should seek God’s blessing in an opening prayer at every session! When I think about truths like this and contrast them with the utter contempt for and avoidance of any semblance of Christian thought by today’s governing leaders, I am both amazed and disgusted. | | As a nation, we have turned slowly away from the God who “governs the affairs of men” and relied instead on our own understanding. Look where it has got us: Since the Roe v Wade ruling in 1973, an average of 600,000 babies have been murdered in the womb each year. As of 2018, gun violence is the leading cause of death for children and teens. Every year, excessive drinking is responsible for the deaths of more than 3,500 people under the legal drinking age. We’ve pushed God out of our classrooms, courtrooms, and living rooms—and we are reaping the consequences. What’s the solution? We as a nation must invite Him back in. That starts with changing individual hearts and lives. And that change can only come about through the proclamation of God’s Word. If you are ready to be counted among those who wish to live the true Christian life without hesitation or apology, I invite you to sign a pledge resolving to do so. This pledge, created by the ministry of Pathway to Victory , is a simple way to show that you stand with us and believe that America is a Christian nation. Change can and will take place when we as believers take our faith seriously. There is hope for the future of America—and it starts with a firm resolve to shine the light of Jesus Christ. Sharing the Truth of God’s Word, Dr. Robert Jeffress Sent to Reclaiming American Freedom subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

I am pleased to announce my latest endorsement from the Krimson PAC! I’m running for Mayor of Houston to ensure that all Houstonians (no matter your neighborhood) have the opportunity to thrive! | | | Amanda is fighting to ensure that our minority and women-owned businesses have the resources they need. I am pleased to announce my latest endorsement from the Krimson PAC! I’m running for Mayor of Houston to ensure that all Houstonians (no matter your neighborhood) have the opportunity to thrive! Krimson PAC is non-partisan and committed to financially supporting viable candidates who will improve our communities while building political capital. It supports candidates and issues that provide fair and equal access under the law for underserved communities at the national, state and local levels. Not only do my ideals align with the Krimson PAC, its efforts to lift up marginalized voices and fight for economic justice have been felt throughout the country. I am honored to be among their endorsed candidates — I know I’m in exceptionally good company — one of their candidates, Senator Warnock, just made history by winning a critical reelection campaign in Georgia! name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Thank you again for the amazing year we had! Here are some of the things we accomplished together with Democrats across the country …
body:
A year of successes
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T254c224b-f698-44a3-8c4f-a4155cb22aa3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Dear Peter, **Thank you again for the amazing year that we had. We are proud of the just under $500,000 you--the Blue Amp Action community--donated to Democratic candidates and progressive causes across the country.** Don't think this didn't make a difference. We sure [didn't get everything right](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb730900b-5185-4dce-8f0e-be8e072f3e6b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), but we [knew to ignore the conventional wisdom of a Red Wave (LOL)](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc7106041-4ec5-49ee-8be2-3671df584f93/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). We saw Gen Z voting their hearts out, women ditching the GOP over abortion rights and college-educated suburban Republicans leaving the party over its attack on democracy. Some said it was a waste to talk about these subjects, that people only cared about economics. We knew they were wrong. And they were. Here are some of the things we accomplished together with Democrats across the country: *We brought the Mary Peltola and Greg Landsman races in Alaska and Ohio to Blue Amp's attention when many thought we couldn't win them, and in both we beat GOP seditionists ([goodbye Sarah Palin!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T22ed3647-d43b-4c89-b00c-85dce7c30860/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)) and elected great Democrats! * We also thought the numbers and enthusiasm was telling us a story that Democrats, the media and Republicans were not taking Adam Frisch's candidacy vs Lauren Boebert seriously enough. We supported him and in the end, in a +6 GOP district out of over 327,000 votes cast, we only lost by 540! * We also [knew we could hold onto the Senate or even increase our margin](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tac9f1340-087a-41e3-adee-bbe54bc5fcee/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) no matter what the naysayers blathered about on cable and in the pages of the NY Times--I mean had you seen our candidates? And theirs!?!? Again, we were right. We gained Senator John Fetterman. Democrats succeeded in protecting Senators Mark Kelly, Catherine Cortez Masto, Maggie Hassan, Raphael Warnock and more ... with plenty of help from the Blue Amp Action community! **Grassroots Democrats like you made it so Republicans had to spend $50 million to beat Tim Ryan, and many millions more to beat Cheri Beasley and Mandela Barnes--all of whom ran great races. And while they were spending gobs of money eking out these wins, they weren't spending it against Kelly, Cortez Masto, Hassan, etc. This made a HUGE difference. And it made this the first cycle when a President's party didn't lose Senate seats since Franklin Roosevelt in 1934!** * Democrats defeated every ballot measure attacking abortion. [Every. Single. One.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td82d4dfd-3856-4938-b8f7-0261385d874d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) And we picked up state legislative chambers in Minnesota, Pennsylvania and both in Michigan, gaining legislative seats in several other states. This was only the third time that happened in favor of the President's party in a midterm since 1900! And Democrats elected and re-elected great governors in Michigan, Pennsylvania, Arizona, Kansas, Minnesota, Wisconsin, Colorado and many other contested states. We stopped lunatics like [Don Bolduc](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbf430cdc-fc7e-436e-b952-4f6e073cd269/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), Doug Mastriano and [Kari Lake](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta0f1c79a-c020-4510-ad87-5dbbb73e279a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). And, if we're being honest, it was decisions by Republican judges in New York, Ron DeSantis' authoritarian gerrymandering in Florida--which the Court allowed to stand for this election--and Republicans' refusal to fully follow the state court ruling in Ohio on gerrymandering that won the House for them. Cheating, it's what they do. Thank you for everything you’ve been part of accomplishing this year. And Happy Holidays to you all! Cliff [**PS: Appreciate our work finding timely actions and good candidates to share with you? Your $5, $10, or $25 contribution would mean vital support for our network’s efforts to defend the Biden agenda—and important causes like abortion access—in the coming year.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T38911a77-4757-420e-8e3d-38b633923efc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. clean_body: A year of successes | | | | | | | | | | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can. | | | | | | | | Dear Peter, Thank you again for the amazing year that we had. We are proud of the just under $500,000 you--the Blue Amp Action community--donated to Democratic candidates and progressive causes across the country. Don't think this didn't make a difference. We sure , but we . We saw Gen Z voting their hearts out, women ditching the GOP over abortion rights and college-educated suburban Republicans leaving the party over its attack on democracy. Some said it was a waste to talk about these subjects, that people only cared about economics. We knew they were wrong. And they were. Here are some of the things we accomplished together with Democrats across the country: We brought the Mary Peltola and Greg Landsman races in Alaska and Ohio to Blue Amp's attention when many thought we couldn't win them, and in both we beat GOP seditionists () and elected great Democrats! We also thought the numbers and enthusiasm was telling us a story that Democrats, the media and Republicans were not taking Adam Frisch's candidacy vs Lauren Boebert seriously enough. We supported him and in the end, in a +6 GOP district out of over 327,000 votes cast, we only lost by 540! We also no matter what the naysayers blathered about on cable and in the pages of the NY Times--I mean had you seen our candidates? And theirs!?!? Again, we were right. We gained Senator John Fetterman. Democrats succeeded in protecting Senators Mark Kelly, Catherine Cortez Masto, Maggie Hassan, Raphael Warnock and more ... with plenty of help from the Blue Amp Action community! Grassroots Democrats like you made it so Republicans had to spend $50 million to beat Tim Ryan, and many millions more to beat Cheri Beasley and Mandela Barnes--all of whom ran great races. And while they were spending gobs of money eking out these wins, they weren't spending it against Kelly, Cortez Masto, Hassan, etc. This made a HUGE difference. And it made this the first cycle when a President's party didn't lose Senate seats since Franklin Roosevelt in 1934! Democrats defeated every ballot measure attacking abortion. And we picked up state legislative chambers in Minnesota, Pennsylvania and both in Michigan, gaining legislative seats in several other states. This was only the third time that happened in favor of the President's party in a midterm since 1900! And Democrats elected and re-elected great governors in Michigan, Pennsylvania, Arizona, Kansas, Minnesota, Wisconsin, Colorado and many other contested states. We stopped lunatics like , Doug Mastriano and . And, if we're being honest, it was decisions by Republican judges in New York, Ron DeSantis' authoritarian gerrymandering in Florida--which the Court allowed to stand for this election--and Republicans' refusal to fully follow the state court ruling in Ohio on gerrymandering that won the House for them. Cheating, it's what they do. Thank you for everything you’ve been part of accomplishing this year. And Happy Holidays to you all! From growing up on a ranch, to serving in Congress, and now leading my home state as Governor, I'll share with you the humorous stories and larger than life people who made me who I am today.

This memoir is incredibly important for every Conservative to read because America must return to the values my ranch upbringing instilled in me like: grit, hard work, and rugged individualism.

clean_body: Before I have to move on to another patriot. | | | | 🚨🚨 LAST AND FINAL CALL TO CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY 🚨🚨 Hi there Friend, This is your LAST AND FINAL CALL to secure your signed copy of my new memoir, Not My First Rodeo! Because fewer than 50 signed copies remain! Copies have been flying off the shelves, and we are down to our last box. I wish I could sign a copy for every conservative supporter, but sadly this exclusive offer must come to a close. "So here is ONE LAST CHANCE to secure 1 of 50 remaining signed copies!" | "Kristi Noem Book" Not My First Rodeo by Kristi Noem | | | "CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY" From growing up on a ranch, to serving in Congress, and now leading my home state as Governor, I'll share with you the humorous stories and larger than life people who made me who I am today. This memoir is incredibly important for every Conservative to read because America must return to the values my ranch upbringing instilled in me like: grit, hard work, and rugged individualism. Not My First Rodeo by Kristi Noem | | | "CLAIM YOUR SIGNED COPY" "So get your signed copy today before we must end this offer for good. name: Delegate John McGuire III
subject: Big News for Virginia Veterans!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire
body:
---
| | | |
| Delegate John McGuire
Father Navy SEAL Business Owner
Running for State Senate District 10
Big News For Virginia Veterans!
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zFfrcLGvLlbfCn4qmYfClh2XLN-PXTVR1v8HjaxxWFuHudgkbBTa_ccmMWDITmzNl8ZPkK_DJGcg19w7GDz-DoGVaJMnKszvuJ9zy-zabMs1rskW9ItPCI0vcVcFnIP9lDR3uhGCQKcE-w02VmL33O36VBHb9rpy-i_Xev5EFmUKiRIdPbmQxg==&c=uEbRAq2-n-183FQ4_Re8AoCm4Xj6A8hpYhV82HyA9khcotq0oles0g==&ch=wIWmdaU4fTUfBuZyG588QZhpjIIrr57aPwIyGCm7baDLmOnJLXkGPw==)
---
| Friends,
After thirty years with no result, we achieved the largest veteran tax decrease in Virginia history [Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zFfrcLGvLlbfCn4qmYfClh2XLN-PXTVR1v8HjaxxWFuHudgkbBTa_ZBBkGBw9qP3Xjsgm7lamI9m83QSiGLE-5LJILUzOLXYToDRvScPiNfccV7Loc0J4o_x9XAXiWflvU3Ht4VXTKwngCYPNfCxXf6EhR9jug66kKjF0Ud3UJK8sdxdMko7FJRFtE4ymUnIWyEeCLcS_yb_JivM8hVAZWe7s-wYxeMfYeEu4BzUyqfVzyU-nmzMdw==&c=uEbRAq2-n-183FQ4_Re8AoCm4Xj6A8hpYhV82HyA9khcotq0oles0g==&ch=wIWmdaU4fTUfBuZyG588QZhpjIIrr57aPwIyGCm7baDLmOnJLXkGPw==). We were able to reduce taxes on Veteran retirement pay in 2022 by $40,000 with my bill, HB 1128. The Senate version, SB 528, would have only reduced taxes by $15,000 and had an age 65 requirement. My bill had no age requirement. We worked hard and conformed the Senate version to my bill HB 1128, and we achieved the $40,000 tax reduction, but we ended up with an age 55 requirement compromise to receive the benefit. This was a huge step forward in 2022 for Virginia Veterans. Special thanks to Governor Youngkin, Delegate Barry Knight, my colleagues in the House and Senate and many others for helping us achieve this 30-year milestone!
To finish what we started, several weeks ago, I drafted legislation to eliminate the age 55 requirement put on my bill HB 1128 in order to pass it this year.
Good News! I spoke with Gov. Youngkin at the Capitol, and he informed me there is money set aside in the budget for us to eliminate the age 55 requirement. Senator Bryce Reeves will carry the Senate version. I am praying everyone will support this effort in 2023!
---
| State Senate Race
---
| Please [Click here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001zFfrcLGvLlbfCn4qmYfClh2XLN-PXTVR1v8HjaxxWFuHudgkbBTa_SYgpsPn01ljFlFRGCnFofroLR_OZaMhCKhS2tDrcDDIMLXV9rtvgmyhG4pVzrlta6vnmXe1VoScRSRVpNub3vu9_wSBbQn2FBJFXWqyBiBTmffQnRltd5ynShYTWangSk0HeZBkT9LZwkxLbHMZwctP0ENZ63aIQEYX4kHqTu3LEI1nNfggVmNv9k7UVS4cA_ZnIrXGA-rp&c=uEbRAq2-n-183FQ4_Re8AoCm4Xj6A8hpYhV82HyA9khcotq0oles0g==&ch=wIWmdaU4fTUfBuZyG588QZhpjIIrr57aPwIyGCm7baDLmOnJLXkGPw==) to submit your commitment to being a delegate for John McGuire at the Senate District 10 convention. We do not have a date or location for you to vote yet, but by signing up we can keep you informed once we know.

Peter, The clock is ticking. As hard as it is to believe, there are only two weeks left until 2023. But 2024 feels eons away compared to the mid-month fundraising deadline which is in **just a few hours.[There are only a few hours until midnight, and we still haven’t hit our goal of $5000 in grassroot contributions. Here’s a simple reality about politics: **raising resources early helps win races.**
By staying on track with our fundraising goals, we’re able to plan for the long haul and make strategic investments in organizing and digital outreach that set us up for success.
**Our opponents are razor focused on electing extremists in 2023, and we need to keep them at bay by matching their effort and running strong Democratic candidates across the board.**
[**If you can, Peter, chip in whatever you can right now and help us hit our grassroots fundraising deadline. name: Patrick Leahy
subject: Grateful and humbled
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leahy for U
body:
It's been a privilege to represent our state in the Senate.

| Friend - During the 48 years I've had the privilege to represent our state of Vermont in the United States Senate, Marcelle and I have often gone to the top of the Capitol Dome and admired the view of the Washington Monument, Lincoln Memorial, Smithsonian Institution, and so much of our nation's capital. I've treasured the time I have served as a Senator because of what I could do for the benefit of Vermont, our country, and the world. I'm especially grateful and humbled by the trust our Vermont friends and neighbors have given me for 48 years. Now we gratefully return to Vermont with the unique memories of those decades--and the great joy of being home. Our warmest holiday wishes to all. Patrick and Marcelle Leahy
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://leahyforvermont.com/unsubscribe?m=21691155&r=NjY1MDk1OTIyMTMzS0&j=MjUwMDkzNzQ1MAS2&l=11892502&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). Contributions or gifts to Leahy for U.S. Senator Committee, Inc. are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Leahy for U.S. Senator Committee, Inc.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Leon=20Benjamin?=
subject: We have one more House race in this cycle
body:
| | | **VA-4 (OUR RACE) is now the

LAST House Race of this Congress...

THAT IS OURS TO WIN!**
---
[](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=76e8721973&e=fdefed58de)
Peter,**Let's face the facts; the Red Wave flopped. They were saying 40-60 seat majority in the House. 60! Well, now it is just a handful of seats, but ONE RACE IS UNDECIDED. Our race has a vacancy in our**[**SLIM MAJORITY**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=e3ec2e3d0d&e=fdefed58de)**in the House that needs filling.****My race, my community, VA-4, has no voice in Washington. Our communities are hopeless and deserve a voice. I ran and with no RNC support, and no House support, I nearly won.**[**Now is our chance to liberate this district from the grasp of freedom suppression.**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=be75efb38f&e=fdefed58de)
**Freedom from their Democrat plantation is a scary thing, but like myself, I WILL liberate my community.**[ Help me REPLACE WHAT THEY STOLE! RUSH $50, $100, $150!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=9598c21dd0&e=fdefed58de)[**Americans are waking up to the lies, and the Left is desperate! Chip in NOW- $25, $50, $100!**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=e0568f78ee&e=fdefed58de)
| [HELP ME LIBERATE THE BLACK COMMUNITY!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=a1137d8de1&e=fdefed58de)
---
**As a Navy Combat Veteran, I served this country and the American people. Now I’m running for Congress as the GOP Nominee for VA-4 to serve again!****While the Left works to destroy our free speech, right to bear arms, and civil liberties, I’m organizing a grassroots campaign team like NEVER SEEN BEFORE.****The Left is SCARED and is pumping dark money into my opponent's campaign. LIKE CRAZY! I need your help; I need reinforcements. I’m tired of We The People being neglected by those in office with the privilege of serving us. They have a sense of political entitlement that is truly sick and wrong.**
| [HELP LEON TAKE BACK AMERICA!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=1d2f018274&e=fdefed58de)
---
**My name is Leon Benjamin, and I’m running for Congress as a BLACK Conservative Republican... because I’m sick of what the far Left has done to my community and to American families. I’m a husband, father, and pastor.

I owe it to my congregation and my family to build a better future. These days we need to fight for them even to have a future.****I didn't serve this country to see it burned to the ground by BLM anarchists or tassel loafer-wearing government bureaucrats. I served to defend our constitution. Defend our liberties. Defend our people, or die trying.**
| [HELP LEON SERVE THE PEOPLE!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=b7c4bbf223&e=fdefed58de)
---
**Patriot, I’ve spent my entire life serving my community and serving our nation.****I’m a Navy Combat Veteran, Small Business Owner, and Senior Pastor and Bishop at my church. I even helped create President Trump’s Faith-Based Initiative back in 2016.****I’m up against a proxy-voting DC sellout who sells out Christianity and the black community at every SECOND!**
| [LET’S FIGHT FOR THIS COUNTRY!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=2f8d27ce1d&e=fdefed58de)
---
[**Now, polling shows what we already know. The Left, which claims to serve the marginalized and minority communities, is the party culpable for the “serious financial problems” from inflation.**](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=19d1979eca&e=fdefed58de)

**If the Left really cared about the Black community, as President Trump does, then we would have seen greater action decades ago as we saw in the last administration. It’s time the Left learned that conservative principles and conservative values ARE BLACK VALUES.****BLM and Antifa are more focused on destroying our communities and burning them down than fighting issues affecting us like inflation, high gas prices, or higher consumer prices. They are hateful, destructive, and out of touch.**
| [HELP ME DEFEAT BLM AND ANTIFA!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=e73dd144e9&e=fdefed58de)
---
**This is a special election and this is our moment to increase our House majority to get some REAL results for the people. Can you help me?****God bless you, your families, and God bless America. The country we know, love, and must protect.**

**Your Friend in Christ,****Leon Benjamin**

[ President Joe Biden spoke to African leaders at the U.S.-Africa Leaders Summit, where he announced yesterday that the United States will be sending $8 billion to South Africa in an attempt to close its coal power plants. body:
“America better wake up.” - Texas Lt. Governor Dan Patrick |
**_"You're talking about millions of people allowed to come into this country. That is not the duty of the president of the United States to allow our state of Texas to be invaded or this country to be invaded ... I believe it's an impeachable offense..."_
- Lt. Governor Dan Patrick, TX**
Fellow American,

Our southern border is seeing a COLOSSAL influx of illegal immigrants - _and where is Joe Biden?_

FOLKS - this is not only a humanitarian crisis but also a national security crisis AND a healthcare crisis.

Dangerous criminals and drugs are coming into our country, and the White House is doing NOTHING.

Extremist Republican-controlled state legislatures could have full agency over elections and force their way to victories. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | While you read this, Trump is continuing to spread false voter fraud claims and spew lies about the results of the midterm elections while beginning his run for President in 2024. If Moore v. Harper implements the radical Independent State Legislature theory, Trump’s dream of overturning the election in 2020 could become a reality in 2024! That’s why we need you to act today -Moore v. Harper has concerning consequences for the 2024 election, potentially leaving the power to decide elections in the hands of state legislators. name: Alexandra Rojas (via JusticeDemocrats.com)
subject: Why this announcement is so important
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, did you see
the news from Senator Bernie Sanders? We just launched our 2024 Candidate
Recruitment Campaign.

Since we launched JD after Bernie’s 2016 campaign just a few short years
ago, we’ve gone up against the political establishment many times and won
— but this work takes major resources.

With your support, we’ve accomplished a lot. But since we’ve seen a steady
decline in our fundraising this entire year, we really need your help to
reach our $120,000 Candidate Recruitment fundraising goal.

Thank you for being a part of this movement to reimagine the Democratic
Party. But I also need to ask for your financial support today:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123241?refcode=em20221215-26571&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=26571%2E1203867%2EnhfYqG ]If you’ve been waiting to make your first contribution to support our
work, this is the best time to pitch in because your donation will help us
recruit the next generation of Justice Democrats. Will you make a
contribution of any amount you can afford?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123241?refcode=em20221215-26571&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=26571%2E1203867%2EnhfYqG ]Contribute $3

Justice Democrats began after Bernie Sanders’ 2016 presidential campaign.
A few staffers, myself included, decided to continue the work to elect
progressives by launching Justice Democrats. For a team with a small
budget, we’ve had quite an impact in the last few years.

In 2018, we recruited and worked with Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez every
single step of the way to help her defeat one of the most entrenched,
powerful, corporate-backed incumbents in Congress.

Then in 2020, we recruited and helped elect Jamaal Bowman and Cori Bush,
sending their strong progressive voices to Congress and expanding our bloc
in Congress.

This cycle, we recruited Summer Lee to run for office, helped her overcome
millions of dollars in outside Super PAC money and we successfully helped
re-elect every single member of the Squad.

We’ll never have as much money as the political establishment because we
refuse to take a dime from corporate PACs and we don’t have billionaire
funders who can help out if we fall short of our goals. Our work is truly
powered by tens of thousands of people like you chipping in because they
believe in what we’re fighting for.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123241?refcode=em20221215-26571&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=26571%2E1203867%2EnhfYqG ]So what do you say,
Peter? Will you make a
$3 contribution right now to help us raise $120,000 so we
can fully fund our 2024 recruitment efforts? We’re counting on your
support.

We are in a fight for nothing less than the soul of the Democratic Party.
Thank you for everything that you’re doing to help us push forward. We
couldn’t do this work without you.

In solidarity,

Alexandra Rojas
Executive Director, Justice Democrats

PS: [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123103?refcode=em20221215-26571&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=26571%2E1203867%2EnhfYqG ]Please join Summer Lee and me on a Zoom Rally at 8 PM ET tonight
to officially kick off our next cycle of work! Hope to see you there.

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1024&akid=26571%2E1203867%2EnhfYqG ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1025&akid=26571%2E1203867%2EnhfYqG ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221215-26571-footer&t=1026&refcode2=26571_1203867_nhfYqG&akid=26571%2E1203867%2EnhfYqG

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1027&akid=26571%2E1203867%2EnhfYqG

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Full Mag News
subject: For a limited time
body:
The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation’s history. This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=870b66641fe442829d4166f53ff75aa8&_e=7uc7LeH0dUx_zT6oyFpph2C7P-sksnGWwl8n5v3l5arRkTstyr_cGBvI0mbkQcuPhRnfsL5UzGVjmNR1dfH9dTsvMo67l49lVH_lZ76WjU_O1JQDAXhE8gJ2i-d1wGTc2WmUoaHsfv8GiXNyvgPhbbWqOts5d-8VllGzJm41UTUsv1DOmO9BpP56QrWhAP-NDsfm0bZYqMV-VKyMu1Wz-xT2wk1YNKfKqTFGksoFWmDGjBGgZ7QVS3Po9fSNchhRTGb2T2QmjxQhxIqJ30UbimfIZHShEEoRGv9wpdR0lNHpy0wIgzvljBH6AMnxDw-dTornxNsB3HpV__oZtaXOqjlGy2MkV_EFfAYJVG5sHfT-sYYvonUHPfML9dVZYiFmiqWb0J_EBwC9BHjg1IsHag%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, The events of the last year have no precedent in our nation's history. They've shaken me, and I'm sure they've affected you as well. Throughout it all, you may have noticed a recurring theme from the progressives in the media, Big Tech, and politics. They insist that the government designed by our Founding Fathers, as expressed in the Constitution, is **flawed** and **outdated** --not adequate for the challenges of our time. How should defenders of the Constitution, like you and me, respond to such charges? Well, a few early champions of the Constitution--Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison--have given you the guide: _The Federalist Papers_. Written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, _The Federalist Papers_ were originally published as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described _The Federalist Papers_ as "the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written." That means that defenders of the Constitution have no better help in understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than the words of the Founders themselves. **So, I 'd like to send you our entire 10-lesson course, "_The Federalist Papers_ ,"on DVD today with a donation of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.** _**" The Federalist Papers"**_ course comes in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or a small group. You might also find it useful for a homeschool curriculum or personal study. It's taught by Hillsdale's knowledgeable faculty and will deepen your understanding of this incredibly relevant document even more. The DVD can also make an excellent gift for a friend or family member unfamiliar with our nation's founding principles of liberty. [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=870b66641fe442829d4166f53ff75aa8&_e=7uc7LeH0dUx_zT6oyFpph2C7P-sksnGWwl8n5v3l5arRkTstyr_cGBvI0mbkQcuPhRnfsL5UzGVjmNR1dfH9dTsvMo67l49lVH_lZ76WjU_O1JQDAXhE8gJ2i-d1wGTc2WmUoaHsfv8GiXNyvgPhbbWqOts5d-8VllGzJm41UTUsv1DOmO9BpP56QrWhAP-NDsfm0bZYqMV-VKyMu1Wz-xT2wk1YNKfKqTFGksoFWmDGjBGgZ7QVS3Po9fSNchhRNDgIwbHXpAI6cApEsLG8wkUo1AI96jM2JPZDyUcYG8bPfGetPmkJ5gMG1xUzBdE_KxqwQhcbzlsUy22HiewZn7d64I3QHC5xxyzSnP4ZcKTAyj4rOr2dKMSX2zI5J7VwUPRQz3nZjTCSm2LIJBXYWQ%3D%3D) Supplies are limited, though, so get this special edition of **_" The Federalist Papers"_** on DVD today. Given that more than 200,000 people have taken this course already, you can bet the DVD box set won't last long. Click here to learn more about this DVD and order your copy of _**" The Federalist Papers"**_ today: [**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-federalist-papers**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=870b66641fe442829d4166f53ff75aa8&_e=7uc7LeH0dUx_zT6oyFpph2C7P-sksnGWwl8n5v3l5arRkTstyr_cGBvI0mbkQcuPhRnfsL5UzGVjmNR1dfH9dTsvMo67l49lVH_lZ76WjU_O1JQDAXhE8gJ2i-d1wGTc2WmUoaHsfv8GiXNyvgPhbbWqOts5d-8VllGzJm41UTUsv1DOmO9BpP56QrWhAP-NDsfm0bZYqMV-VKyMu1Wz-xT2wk1YNKfKqTFGksoFWmDGjBGgZ7QVS3Po9fSNchhROt-1NSY3wLeYfq7YZVhbSgP9KAl9-4ufo4nbInZRGib-VB7XB6vISA9VajXkab4EMNPVwNzavMxVpWtKtfr94Gq2gN5358w-SK5lpIYfwhN8d1beff8wGScDwr8v3wJr0ECV_H7IdRjmLwQvHecEdQ%3D%3D) Warm regards, Bill Gray Class of 2001 Associate Vice President of National Donor Outreach Hillsdale College

subject: BREAKING: IL GOP Donor Update
body:
Startling revelation exposes the bold hypocrisy of nearly half of the state central committee

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/42dd0f284043/breaking-il-gop-donor-update?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2835874dbd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_15_10_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2835874dbd-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

GOP State Central Committee's Donation Problem: Most Don't Donate to the IL GOP, Despite Kolber Belittling Grassroots (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/gop-state-central-committees-donation-problem-most-dont-donate-to-the-il-gop-despite-kolber-belittling-grassroots.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2835874dbd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_15_10_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2835874dbd-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

The IL GOP establishment has a message for the grassroots: if you don’t donate to the party, then your voice doesn’t matter.

And this obsession with money has played out over the last several weeks in public comments for all to see and hear.

https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/gop-state-central-committees-donation-problem-most-dont-donate-to-the-il-gop-despite-kolber-belittling-grassroots.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2835874dbd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_15_10_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2835874dbd-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Consider Leslie Munger, a two-time failed (https://ballotpedia.org/Leslie_Munger?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2835874dbd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_15_10_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2835874dbd-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) establishment candidate who’s never won an election, who said (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/11/embattled-il-gop-chair-don-tracy-becomes-distraction-as-names-surface-to-replace-him.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2835874dbd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_15_10_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2835874dbd-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) ,

“I’m struck by the number of people who have never run for office, never run a campaign, never canvassed thousands of doors, never raised millions of dollars to support Republican political efforts, and/or never contributed substantial funds to the ILGOP or a specific candidate are now the loudest voices complaining about the results of this election.”

Munger then finished her sentence with,

“I have done all of the above.”

Or former state central committee member Lynn O’Brien, who
endorsed (https://capitolfax.com/2022/01/18/irvin-rolls-out-over-60-gop-endorsements/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2835874dbd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_15_10_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2835874dbd-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) the Richard Irvin for Governor campaign, publicly commenting on a recent Facebook post writing (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-establishment-to-grassroots-only-rich-donor-voices-matter.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2835874dbd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_15_10_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2835874dbd-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) ,

“We can’t or shouldn’t complain if we haven’t given money...”

But the most shocking comment goes to senior IL GOP official and chairman of the finance committee – who provided the financial update during Saturday’s state central committee meeting, Vince Kolber, a multi-millionaire businessman – who’s
registered to vote (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/inside-the-il-gops-obsession-with-money-and-protecting-chairman-don-tracy.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2835874dbd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_15_10_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2835874dbd-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) in Illinois and Wisconsin, and asked a pompous question to a room full of hardworking grassroots conservatives,

“I assume all of you have donated to the IL GOP?”

And when the room yelled back,

“No!”

He replied,

“No? Then what are you doing here?”

The belittling, arrogant and out-of-touch comment drew an immediate reaction from the crowd, still stunned that a GOP leader would say something so offensive to a room full of hardworking, grassroots patriots – many of whom had driven hours, just for their voices to be heard.

And judging by the negative reaction from the crowd, state central committee member and ally of Kolber, Jeanne Ives, jumped up from her seat in defense of Kolber, screaming,

“Vince is not your problem! This man gave me $750,000 when I ran against Gov. Bruce Rauner!”

Again, reiterating the point that the establishment makes every time – that only money matters – and if you
donate (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-establishment-to-grassroots-only-rich-donor-voices-matter.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2835874dbd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_15_10_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2835874dbd-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) to the party, then you can say whatever you want.

But Illinois Review recently has learned that 8 of the 17, or 48% of the state central committee members have not made any donation to the IL GOP.

That’s worth repeating again.

48% of the state central committee members have not donated to the organization (IL GOP) for which they serve on the governing body.

Here are some of those members, but not all of them.
Judy Diekelman (https://www.opensecrets.org/donor-lookup/results?name=Judy+Diekelman&cycle=&state=&zip=&employ=&occupation=&jurisdiction=&cand=&type=&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2835874dbd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_15_10_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2835874dbd-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , District 2;

Jeanne Ives (https://www.elections.il.gov/CampaignDisclosure/ContributionSearchByAllContributions.aspx?ddlContributionType=wOGh3QTPfKqV2YWjeRmjTeStk426RfVK&ddlState=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&ddlFiledDateTime=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&ddlFiledDateTimeThru=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&txtLastOnlyName=RyWEiEd40FE3Gsusz9PFQg%3d%3d&ddlLastOnlyNameSearchType=uhV70GVj7rs2mYAJ0IPVG%2fPXF28eNgo%2f&txtFirstName=CzyldNVNdHw8IV3tFCeLVw%3d%3d&ddlFirstNameSearchType=uhV70GVj7rs2mYAJ0IPVG%2fPXF28eNgo%2f&ddlVendorState=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2835874dbd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_15_10_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2835874dbd-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , District 3;

Jesus “Jay” Reyes (https://www.opensecrets.org/donor-lookup/results?name=Jesus+reyes&cycle=&state=IL&zip=&employ=&occupation=&jurisdiction=&cand=&type=&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2835874dbd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_15_10_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2835874dbd-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , District 4;

Joan Lasonde (https://www.opensecrets.org/donor-lookup/results?name=Joan+Lasonde&cycle=&state=IL&zip=&employ=&occupation=&jurisdiction=&cand=&type=&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2835874dbd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_15_10_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2835874dbd-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , District 9, who served as the unofficial “timekeeper” at the SCC meeting last Saturday, yelling “Time!” at the 90-second mark, but only when grassroots conservatives spoke;

Laura Pollastrini (https://www.opensecrets.org/donor-lookup/results?name=Laura+Pollastrini&cycle=&state=IL&zip=&employ=&occupation=&jurisdiction=&cand=&type=&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2835874dbd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_15_10_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2835874dbd-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , District 11, who recently took over as Treasurer from Vince Kolber;

Larry Smith (https://www.elections.il.gov/CampaignDisclosure/ContributionSearchByAllContributions.aspx?ddlContributionType=wOGh3QTPfKqV2YWjeRmjTeStk426RfVK&ddlState=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&ddlFiledDateTime=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&ddlFiledDateTimeThru=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&txtLastOnlyName=GPPdaG1appFzduucFLw2kg%3d%3d&ddlLastOnlyNameSearchType=uhV70GVj7rs2mYAJ0IPVG%2fPXF28eNgo%2f&txtFirstName=vapJZ9T4JQoBSJ44aLfidg%3d%3d&ddlFirstNameSearchType=uhV70GVj7rs2mYAJ0IPVG%2fPXF28eNgo%2f&ddlVendorState=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2835874dbd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_15_10_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2835874dbd-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , District 14;

Jan Weber (https://www.opensecrets.org/donor-lookup/results?name=Jan+Weber&cycle=&state=IL&zip=&employ=&occupation=&jurisdiction=&cand=&type=&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2835874dbd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_15_10_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2835874dbd-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , District 16; and

Chad Weaver (https://www.opensecrets.org/donor-lookup/results?name=Chad+Weaver&cycle=&state=IL&zip=&employ=&occupation=&jurisdiction=&cand=&type=&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2835874dbd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_15_10_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2835874dbd-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , District 17.
An “Honorable Mention” goes out to Mark Hosty.

Mark gave $200 (https://www.opensecrets.org/donor-lookup/results?name=Mark+Hosty&cycle=&state=IL&zip=&employ=&occupation=&jurisdiction=&cand=&type=&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=2835874dbd-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2022_12_15_10_04&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-2835874dbd-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) on March 12, 2022, but it was a transfer from “Committee to Elect Mark Hosty.” In other words, he donated other people’s money to the IL GOP – the money did not come directly from his personal bank account.

This discovery by Illinois Review makes state central committee member Jeanne Ives’ defense of Vince Kolber at last Saturday’s meeting, all the more shocking.

The words of Matthew 7:5, “First get rid of the log in your own eye; then you will see well enough to deal with the speck in your friend’s eye,” comes to mind.

And as for Mr. Kolber – instead of addressing his belittling comments to the more than 200 grassroots conservatives in the room at last Saturday’s meeting, perhaps he should have faced his fellow state central committee members (48% of them) instead, and asked,

“What are you doing here?”

name: Andy Beshear
subject: This is how we win — together.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ANDY BESHEAR FOR GOVERNOR
body:
We’re so close to our goal. Hey Peter – I wanted to check in quickly.

This week, my team and I called on our grassroots supporters to step up to the challenge and help us meet our mid-month fundraising goal. So many of you answered the call. **Thanks to your support, we're so close to reaching our $10,000 goal before the deadline at midnight – but we're not quite there yet.**

This will be a long and costly race, and reaching our goals is critical to helping us prepare to face one of a dozen opponents next fall – including a billionaire who will have the luxury of self-funding and practically unlimited spending.

Now that the midterm elections are behind us, we know all eyes are about to be on our race. It's only a matter of time before outside spending floods Kentucky to attack me and undo the progress we've worked so hard for.

**That's why I'm reaching out before our deadline to ask for your support ahead of our mid-month goal. Will you chip in before midnight to help me take on my opponents and protect the progress we're making for Kentucky? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beshear-december22](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56022786/383590827/1325899998?refcode=em22_221215_mm3_fndd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221215_mm3_fndd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDhmZWRiMC1jYTdjLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J0GrCZIGFAVDZWliQ2nYYGV6vHSfmVNfbhDEG-rZO-4=)**

With your continued support, we can win this challenging race. We’ll continue funding our schools, bringing thousands of good-paying jobs to our state, and investing in the things that matter to everyday Kentuckians – and we’re going to do it together.

Thank you, Peter. I truly appreciate your continued support.

-Andy Beshear | | **Andy is fighting to make the Bluegrass State the best place it can be for generations to come, and he needs you on board. Will you chip in today to Andy's re-election campaign?** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56022787/383590828/1325899998?refcode=em22_221215_mm3_fndd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_campaign=em22_221215_mm3_fndd_gq_act___AB_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNDhmZWRiMC1jYTdjLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J0GrCZIGFAVDZWliQ2nYYGV6vHSfmVNfbhDEG-rZO-4=)

| Fellow Patriot,

This is Dr. Ben Carson. As we approach the end of another year, I've been taking some time to reflect on all the things I have to be grateful for. And this year, I'm especially grateful for patriots who are standing in defense of America's guiding values in 2022. [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c06d6dd9162649269047c4cd44506441&_e=WTQWpN7ms9fEziND-05jACdiimhNMyF8J2ako56ASc0H-9SpzSBcO0QyEwSf6Bh3aKJcxAjcQhsZiOqhH2PLyUSxsHEa_UGk3aFSazJL9dfTmq7TMuH0iV6HO7ykb-3pzq6XdU48-rgSJJxW08GDrspvyJg892eOZnOX-q_pn2oZf40m6v43UAA_0IKa8yGJ7sGzwKRZ9ctCq9scM7KEToujb1NgRFqHrp7akGdYvcr1ZTPiqViBh3DDeLL30dfFYQQsxE9o2430QOYB3NcaPWUpzxVSW6xfbOClGvqOpf5h0t7Vgt2Jsvx8PggCvn34i6Ew_RtNydckHnc9aTJoldP6UKrP_YEyrD8N_Z_gWeWepkibKE5lQE6Ap-jgYZEv) So before you close out this email, [can you spare two quick minutes to join me in signing your name to our special Four Pillars Pledge?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c06d6dd9162649269047c4cd44506441&_e=WTQWpN7ms9fEziND-05jACdiimhNMyF8J2ako56ASc0H-9SpzSBcO0QyEwSf6Bh3aKJcxAjcQhsZiOqhH2PLyUSxsHEa_UGk3aFSazJL9dfTmq7TMuH0iV6HO7ykb-3pzq6XdU48-rgSJJxW08GDrspvyJg892eOZnOX-q_pn2oZf40m6v43UAA_0IKa8yGJ7sGzwKRZ9ctCq9scM7KETr_UBsAnrpDCc_KiTofUfSUL8EwFbQ5ucBPT1oDesjPo2U0uwr59Ifh0IFgsZgSbdZ_44H7UKIfGzH4zrBgrUL_7J6eyQB8hlMJyZCmRvIkjHaB_pH1ld0010-ngoWFet3ma0anHY44jowzuEr8rmPap7gpJ09AVnVBqxefXClxH)

This pledge will affirm your support for America's guiding values and will help us show elected leaders that you care about forging a better path forward for America.

[**To complete this quick 2-minute Four Pillars Pledge just click here now »**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c06d6dd9162649269047c4cd44506441&_e=WTQWpN7ms9fEziND-05jACdiimhNMyF8J2ako56ASc0H-9SpzSBcO0QyEwSf6Bh3aKJcxAjcQhsZiOqhH2PLyUSxsHEa_UGk3aFSazJL9dfTmq7TMuH0iV6HO7ykb-3pzq6XdU48-rgSJJxW08GDrspvyJg892eOZnOX-q_pn2oZf40m6v43UAA_0IKa8yGJ7sGzwKRZ9ctCq9scM7KETujQ6LTLWwaFwkqrAsWcfb0vooa-UrdQTGivt05YjB__XE0u6989hRu9eSxyzK-_gk1jr9WD_232R3YHP4sFU9LXDZ64JxYrjW98hMoLf9m0qKFyjnTXWdiwqFkPP2nAalhtUtC0Difsk5ZLUDISYeBPpM0vcoZasNG9DeGftiQm)

**This special pledge reads:

**
* I believe in the four pillars of American society: faith, liberty, community, and life
* I know these pillars are the foundation for the greatest, freest nation the world has ever seen
* I will help promote and preserve these cornerstones to secure the United States as a beacon of hope and freedom for generations to come
* As 2023 nears, I'm ready to strengthen the bonds that hold our country together by promoting conservative, common-sense solutions to the challenges facing our country

[**If these words reflect what you want for our country in 2023 and beyond, please join me in taking this special pledge today.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c06d6dd9162649269047c4cd44506441&_e=WTQWpN7ms9fEziND-05jACdiimhNMyF8J2ako56ASc0H-9SpzSBcO0QyEwSf6Bh3aKJcxAjcQhsZiOqhH2PLyUSxsHEa_UGk3aFSazJL9dfTmq7TMuH0iV6HO7ykb-3pzq6XdU48-rgSJJxW08GDrspvyJg892eOZnOX-q_pn2oZf40m6v43UAA_0IKa8yGJ7sGzwKRZ9ctCq9scM7KETo1M20_a7ZWuyf3ThEm5PqceG0GofKqUCdCknaSueL-ftWdmq8uJao73nEEiqpL1iksZAkR5DFqudsP0IdVPNHhtTiYq4Sq2tGRZfBstxTTFx8Kx3szEuzVYGj_hGNNKs9QgjkEqBr3W9xHbooMUKtlxt9JpsE2YzJR47r9izq7Q)

This is a critical time to advance freedom in America--so let's head into 2023 with a full head of steam by reminding ourselves, together, of what really matters.

The fight for liberty is more crucial than ever, even if more liberty-minded leaders were sent to Congress. We must remain vigilant in our fight.

You can take this value-affirming pledge now by clicking the secure link below:

[**https://offers.americancornerstone.org/four-pillars-pledge/**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=c06d6dd9162649269047c4cd44506441&_e=WTQWpN7ms9fEziND-05jACdiimhNMyF8J2ako56ASc0H-9SpzSBcO0QyEwSf6Bh3aKJcxAjcQhsZiOqhH2PLyUSxsHEa_UGk3aFSazJL9dfTmq7TMuH0iV6HO7ykb-3pzq6XdU48-rgSJJxW08GDrspvyJg892eOZnOX-q_pn2oZf40m6v43UAA_0IKa8yGJ7sGzwKRZ9ctCq9scM7KETs2iMgSS-MWg9EI6bBYYEXSauABjhAvchSrF39Tam-i6UWDsBlvO1o_SEeTVy-FDY8Rv_OTbQr97-nOYlV4MIphGNp4hpyha6yLvVG8jEhpbx4s3cPzr9pYehN_EhQQr7M7tWTKj0N_iTJYVk4AelddG9aHLEgCF1riNPPbL8jRv)

I've already completed mine--and I hope you'll join me on the list of patriots who are pledging their support for the guiding values that make our nation so exceptional.

May God bless you and your family throughout the holidays.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute
---
