name: Adam Schiff
subject: Kevin McCarthy went on Sean Hannity to attack me…again
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=1458%2E5257348%2Ed5ttQ7 ]Adam Schiff for Congress

Derek, Donald Trump, Kevin McCarthy, and their allies within the
Fox News Misinformation Machine spent the last two years obsessively
attacking me with imagined conspiracies and political grievances in the
hopes of generating a Republican red wave.

Those attacks failed. It was Republicans’ worst midterm House campaign
since the Kennedy administration. Their worst midterm Senate campaign
since President Roosevelt.

Now, Kevin McCarthy and Sean Hannity are doubling down on this same failed
strategy — with McCarthy spreading the same old misinformation, blaming me
for Trump’s Russia and Ukraine misconduct, his mishandling of Covid-19,
and more on Hannity’s Fox News show:

“Why should Adam Schiff — I said two years ago, he has destroyed the Intel
Committee. He lied to the American public. First about the dossier, then he lied
about his staff coordinating with the whistle-blower. He lied about having more
than circumstantial evidence...And yes, Adam Schiff won’t be on there.”

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2022_abs_em.lAzlNJ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20221215_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1004&akid=1458%2E5257348%2Ed5ttQ7 ]Kevin McCarthy (R-CA) House Minorty Leader exclusive on Sean Hannity's show
calling out again how he's going to remove Adam Schiff (D-CA) from the House
Intel Committee

Derek, just because Republicans underperformed expectations last
month doesn’t mean we can afford to ignore false attacks like this. If he
repeats these lies often enough, and we don’t respond, people may begin to
believe them.

Kevin McCarthy is relentlessly attacking me before Sean Hannity’s millions
of viewers on Fox News in an effort to win the loyalty of MAGA
Republicans, including the QAnon followers in Congress that he needs to
vote for him for Speaker. No matter how unhinged McCarthy’s attacks may
be, we can’t give him a free pass to spread misinformation.

So I am asking you personally: [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1312?c0=dec2022_abs_em.XWEzUA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20221215_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1005&akid=1458%2E5257348%2Ed5ttQ7 ]Will you contribute $10 to my campaign
today to help us respond to McCarthy’s attacks?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=dec2022_abs_em.1CmCse&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20221215_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1006&akid=1458%2E5257348%2Ed5ttQ7 ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=dec2022_abs_em.IT0Q1v&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20221215_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1007&akid=1458%2E5257348%2Ed5ttQ7 ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=dec2022_abs_em.pdjp7M&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20221215_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1008&akid=1458%2E5257348%2Ed5ttQ7 ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=dec2022_abs_em.n-QQjE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20221215_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1009&akid=1458%2E5257348%2Ed5ttQ7 ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=dec2022_abs_em.26VRxt&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20221215_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1010&akid=1458%2E5257348%2Ed5ttQ7 ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=dec2022_abs_em.lAzlNJ&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20221215_PM1_V1_S1_VSP&email=&t=1011&akid=1458%2E5257348%2Ed5ttQ7 ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

There are few things more dangerous to a democracy than elected leaders
like McCarthy who will say anything — and do anything — to advance their
own political self-interest.

That’s precisely what we’re seeing from Kevin McCarthy. And I’m counting
on the support of this grassroots team to help put a stop to it.

Thanks for doing what you can to hold him accountable.

— Adam

150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1002&akid=1458%2E5257348%2Ed5ttQ7 ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1003&akid=1458%2E5257348%2Ed5ttQ7 ]Privacy Policy

PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR CONGRESS

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.adamschiff.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1458%2E5257348%2Ed5ttQ7

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: We’re going all in to find the next generation of Justice Democrats
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Just hours ago, we launched our official Candidate Recruitment Fund for
2024 — this is a really big deal and the start of the next phase for our
organization.

Cycle after cycle, we’ve worked tirelessly to find, recruit, and prepare
people-powered candidates to run for office and win. This time is no
different. We’re going all in to find our newest Justice Democrats, and we
need your help.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123159?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com-em20221215-26555&t=1001&akid=26555%2E1203867%2EHA9pyT ]In order to reach our $120,000 goal for our new Candidate Recruitment
Fund, we’re asking you to donate $3 today — and we made a
special link just for you to use. Can we count on you,
Peter?

Peter's Personal Link

Goal for Candidate Recruitment: $120,000

Suggestion Donation Amount: $3

Personal Link:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123159?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com-em20221215-26555&t=1002&akid=26555%2E1203867%2EHA9pyT ]https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdem-20221215-3?refcode=em-dpwillis67@gmail.com

We’re ready to find the next generation of Justice Democrats, but it’s no
small feat. It takes time, energy, and resources to conduct this extensive
search for powerful progressive leaders in communities ready to rally
behind them and unseat entrenched incumbents.

After looking through our budget, we’ve set a goal to raise $120,000 to
fully fund candidate recruitment. We take this work seriously, and we
don’t want to undercut any part of our recruitment program because of a
lack of funding.

We’re a grassroots organization and it’s your support that will allow us
to find and then elect more people-powered progressives to join the Squad
in Congress. So we have to ask: will you go all in with us?

Will you join us for the next phase of our work, chip in to our Candidate
Recruitment Fund, and help us find our new slate of Justice Democrats?

We wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t important.

Here’s your personal link again, please contribute today:
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/123159?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com-em20221215-26555&t=1003&akid=26555%2E1203867%2EHA9pyT ]https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jdem-20221215-3?refcode=em-dpwillis67@gmail.com

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1004&akid=26555%2E1203867%2EHA9pyT ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1005&akid=26555%2E1203867%2EHA9pyT ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20221215-26555-footer&t=1006&refcode2=26555_1203867_HA9pyT&akid=26555%2E1203867%2EHA9pyT

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1007&akid=26555%2E1203867%2EHA9pyT

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Gene Karpinski, LCV
subject: Climate funding in very serious jeopardy (time sensitive)
body:
__This could be really, really bad. |
---

|
Peter -- this past summer, after _years_ of campaigning, we passed the Inflation Reduction Act -- by far the most important action Congress has _ever_ taken to address climate change.

There is now a serious problem: the agencies in charge of implementing the historic investments continue to be underfunded, and as things stand there are only a few days to go before members of Congress head home for the holidays. **The House and Senate haven 't adequately funded climate programs and agencies like the EPA yet.**

**These funding bills _HAVE_ to pass now.** We only have a few working days left where there is an environmental majority in the House, and Republican House leader Kevin McCarthy has already threatened to try to hamstring climate programs and investments when the next Congress takes office in January.

LCV is gearing up for a _massive_ budget fight over the next week. We're driving grassroots petitions from environmentalists into congressional offices and campaigning to prevent anti-environmental legislators from sneaking harmful provisions into a final budget deal. **We need your help:**

[Make an urgent year-end contribution to LCV. Help power our fight to protect climate action. We need to raise $25,000 to make our voice heard on Capitol Hill. Please make a gift today -- even $5 helps.](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/w_)

Our opponents are hoping to use this lame duck period to sneak their anti-environmental agenda through Congress. For example, **corporate polluters are calling for sweeping changes to federal environmental protections** that give citizens the right to review and provide input on projects that could harm the health and safety of their local environment.

**Unless we act fast, these and other anti-environmental provisions could become law.** We need your help to make our voices heard and ensure long-term funding for implementing climate action. |
---
**[**CHIP IN TODAY >>**](https://links.messages.lcv.)**

There's more -- the budget battle is just _first_ on Congress's to-do list this month. There are also a large number of judicial and federal agency nominees awaiting Senate approval, including pro-climate judges who will be _incredibly_ important as Trump's extremist judges continue their assault on long-standing environmental precedents and our fragile democracy.

If we don't confirm these nominees now, the process will start over _from scratch_ when the next Congress is sworn in. With critical environmental decisions made by federal courts every day and judges who serve for life, we have no time to waste. The Senate _must_ act on these nominees now.

[Help power our campaign to protect climate programs and confirm key nominees this month. We need your support -- if everyone reading this email made a gift as small as $5, we'd blow through our $25,000 goal in minutes. Please give now.](https://links.messages.lcv.)

On Election Day, our movement proved one thing: _when we fight, we win._ But we still have key fights before we close out the year. I hope you'll join us and protect climate action today.

Thank you for everything you do. I hope you're doing well as we head into this busy holiday season.

Onward,

Gene Karpinski
President
League of Conservation Voters

---

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=9021985&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY0MDMyNzU5OAS2&spReportId=MTY0MDMyNzU5OAS2). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=9021985&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTY0MDMyNzU5OAS2&spReportId=MTY0MDMyNzU5OAS2) from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](mailto:feedback@lcv.org), or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

[740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683](https://links.messages.lcv.) |

name: Replace Sinema
subject: Sinema's big donors vs. everyone else
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC
body:
| |
---
Peter, If there’s one thing we were all well-aware of before Kyrsten Sinema switched parties, it’s that Kyrsten Sinema puts herself first, her wealthy donors second, and everyone else last. Time and again Sinema has cashed in on donations from private equity, Wall Street, and other special interests – and then did their political bidding in return. [**This is why we’re going to replace her in 2024, chip in now to help us get a head start >>**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zJ5XI6YHChR2bS-m44B_fcGyAtAiNh3jDO2xfqJcO053h73Plyilb7jowFrayGtAr4V5GeOYWeX3YRh3_OZ_3IdzHJGbLLh9bWJPSsIGBScljiNgnbdQf6XkJkYBnkJkMJlRDMkEo9fb2AjxIaqCyJKFUbfwGUeVs1FQ9s8vsFQKQ2U5BiGmzgF4gjyxs6i4QXf7uebk5F6-meRaWoWReeki-9Nemg5z9f46147gmcb0V-wLP0yIvcELvrrXgwadbJW3D5WkJev3HOiOPbtO7mHFv9NQosTEBh0ndL7G2c1jc-hT0vKf_89GEb_nANeBo/3s0/24l2HXSXSxOiTqH7AlS7zA/h0/e9jmWEPZLHUUpWiZmtoHolqRXNi3RvKrSLK7TS_WJBY) Here’s one big example of Sinema doing the bidding of special interests over her constituents:
* Sinema intervened at the last minute to save a special tax loophole for Wall Street.
* The carried interest loophole primarily benefits private equity fund managers and has been widely criticized by both Democrats and Republicans. This loophole is an $18 BILLION per year gift to Wall Street.
* Kyrsten Sinema has taken MILLIONS in campaign contributions from Wall Street – including $1 million in the 2021-2022 campaign cycle.

Simply put: Sinema is a sell-out, no matter what party label she uses. Arizona deserves a Senator who will prioritize their needs, not those of corporate donors. [**That’s why we’ve been laying the groundwork to replace Kyrsten Sinema with a strong Democratic Senator who will put their constituents first in 2024. We know that with your help, we can do it. clean_body: | | Peter, If there’s one thing we were all well-aware of before Kyrsten Sinema switched parties, it’s that Kyrsten Sinema puts herself first, her wealthy donors second, and everyone else last. Time and again Sinema has cashed in on donations from private equity, Wall Street, and other special interests – and then did their political bidding in return. Here’s one big example of Sinema doing the bidding of special interests over her constituents: Sinema intervened at the last minute to save a special tax loophole for Wall Street. The carried interest loophole primarily benefits private equity fund managers and has been widely criticized by both Democrats and Republicans. This loophole is an $18 BILLION per year gift to Wall Street. * Kyrsten Sinema has taken MILLIONS in campaign contributions from Wall Street – including $1 million in the 2021-2022 campaign cycle. Simply put: Sinema is a sell-out, no matter what party label she uses. Arizona deserves a Senator who will prioritize their needs, not those of corporate donors. Thanks for all your help in holding Sinema accountable, -the team at Replace Sinema and Change for Arizona 2024 PAC (formerly “Primary Sinema”) Paid for by Change for Arizona 2024 PAC. | | Sent via . body:
You can bet Republicans are gearing up to spend even more money in the coming election cycle.

| | | _**“Republican business owner Lisa Scheller was the top self-funding candidate to lose.”**_
_\- Roll Call_
---
As final campaign finance reports become publicly available, we’re learning a lot about the landscape of the 2022 midterm elections – and _Roll Call_ has reported that **my opponent, Lisa Scheller, was the top self-funding candidate to lose.**

Even after spending $3.2 million of her personal wealth on her campaign, our opponent was unable to unseat me – because I had the unbeatable power of this grassroots team by my side.

You can bet Republicans are gearing up to spend even more money in the coming election cycle in their efforts to defeat me and hold onto their razor-thin House majority. I’m confident in my ability to continue defending my seat as long as supporters like you keep having my back.

name: KatiePorter.com
subject: Stopping the scams
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Congress
body:
Bad actors are exploiting campaign finance loopholes to scam well meaning donors.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/12?t=1&akid=15556%2E3422442%2E492zmw)
When you make a donation to our campaign, we know you’re entrusting us to spend that money wisely.
Unfortunately, there are PACs out there scamming Republicans and Democrats alike—these scam PACs aren’t spending the money they raise reaching out to voters or advocating for an issue. They’re simply lining their own pockets.
**Katie has introduced bipartisan legislation to allow the FEC to go after these con artists who are exploiting loopholes in our campaign finance system.**
As a consumer protection attorney, Katie will always stand up to fraudsters, and she knows how important it is to have laws that protect people from scams and hold dishonest scammers accountable. What some of these PACs have been doing is especially egregious—going after seniors and veterans in particular who just want to make a difference, all to make a quick profit.
You can ensure you're supporting a real campaign or organization by doing a bit of research to confirm that an organization is real and actively doing the work you intend to support. And if you’re donating to Katie Porter (thank you in advance!) you’ll see this on the Actblue page. ⬇️
[](https://act.katieporter.com/go/13991?refcode=EMAE15_SCA_20221215_V1_F&t=2&akid=15556%2E3422442%2E492zmw)
Thank you for supporting our (very real) campaign.
Team KP

If you would like to receive fewer emails, please [**click here**](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp-unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=15556%2E3422442%2E492zmw).

To contribute via check, please address to: Katie Porter for Congress, PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

Dear friend,

I hope this message finds you well. As you know, thanks to your support, I have been reelected to represent you in Congress. **[Now that we have taken back the majority, we can get to work.](http://links.thehousegop.com/u/click?_t=588630feb05642bf856633600a62821b&_m=16f8117f79c0445cac56b651e4bd2579&_e=H2iwzFX3y0L2o5W8aBjfqqvaryuRZiq6eyv_1U98IYnBzatu-xRzA2_J61VDMqyMUTCKdcJ0Oy9CrCn0PtWbf3KKUAjd5UMAG6nMRb79Ymy227TqVqE9NtJMODkZR_wscJ2pgzkH4hr8_07NdSeytiXKFoHEEzw2RwZMZdK-QfonpYitUD7SKXoRP1O-ptCAo8dcAuVVrNlo62aIyqgey5RxV3JaXslPzXvUsCB_zT2XA_k9UX2TxSpsRvQXklKRjUHoGQ9jCI14mXqvAtPTVs_olYRNfb4Io81fCNMEh6zAww9B4OJ9lybMRFYbCzdfCLqcObqyKWUGhq1TLPLzDAJ1u4P6fsxFY7gxGSzkSuaoCx9-vfiHxAfWQNWIynvbLTqQvPt-xFxy3Jm3UQuCGo_yapSktWIudKJf3SCk5XXVnr7VLh-88kyC_kd5e-B6FPOiyvrNTYgFlf4g4tLBvMOPK1v7n76cMm7zBThSNz8rKVIWArsMBHecaXBxjweW)**

clean_body: We have what it takes | Dear friend, I hope this message finds you well. As you know, thanks to your support, I have been reelected to represent you in Congress. To finish the year strong, I am writing to ask for your help in reaching my December mid-month fundraising goal. | This is my first major goal since the election, and I need your support to make it happen. I am committed to representing the American people, but I need your help to make sure I can continue to fight for your freedom. Your donation will help me to continue to bring your voice to congress. I am confident that together we can make a difference, and I am grateful for your support. Please consider making a donation today to help me reach my mid-month fundraising goal. Thank you for your support. Sincerely, | ---|--- Paid for by House Conservatives Trust Copyright (C) 2022 House Conservatives Trust, All rights reserved.

I told you that Trump was PLUMMETING in the polls. [**Then his far-right allies PANICKED — and funneled him $4.1 MILLION to keep his desperate campaign alive.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/56023955/383595390/1694517773?refcode=20221215_em_fr_b2_pelosi_30_op&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMDk2Y2U2OS1kMDdjLWVkMTEtOWQ3YS0wMDBkM2E5ZWI5MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9H3ZYFwsgo9SPLgUNE9908Sq4YTK6HUZ36NgFQq7hkw=)

[**_We can’t let Trump BUY his way back into the lead with his latest fundraising haul. So I’m springing into action to double-down on my plea from earlier today. name: =?utf-8?Q?True=20the=20Vote?=
subject: Keep the Fight for Election Integrity Going Strong
body:
Keep the Fight for Election Integrity Going Strong | | | |
---
|
---
| | Hi Friend,

This year, 2022, has been one of the most gratifying years in the history of True the Vote, and one of the most difficult.
It is difficult for us all as we begin to fully grasp the state of our elections and bear witness to the profound, and often tragic consequences, that it has on our Republic. Worse, knowing that much of it is deliberate — some at the hands of authorities we may have trusted in the past -- can overwhelm us.
At True the Vote we hold one ideal as our True North: We the People are more powerful than all of them.
Our elections have been corrupted by a thousand cuts and the path to righting these wrongs will be by a thousand measures rather than a singular victory that fixes everything. But when we show up, stand up, and speak out to expose the exploitation of election process, [our actions will drive change](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=9db6090d48&e=ad8cba7e98).
As we approach the end of this tumultuous year and prepare for the storm that lies ahead in 2023 and 2024, we wanted you to [see what True the Vote is all about](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=45b85f709d&e=ad8cba7e98). We are so much more than exposing dropbox Mules and Chinese data breaches.
In 2022, we launched initiatives that address major systemic failures in our elections: dirty voter rolls, and the lack of enforcement of existing election laws. All of our work is intended to engage and grow the community of citizens and law enforcement who want to be part of the solution. In 2023 we will expand these programs and add new projects to the vast scope of our work.
We will never stop investigating those entities, both foreign and domestic, who attempt to subvert our election laws. We will follow the evidence wherever it leads and will continue to fearlessly expose wrongdoing, regardless of the [high price of truth.](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=e76c6f14c8&e=ad8cba7e98)
As you read through the pages of our year-end report, we hope you will gain a better understanding of who we are and what we do. Our purpose is really very simple — to remind voters that they are the safeguards of our representative democracy. Together, we can ensure that out voting processes truly does reflect the will of the People. Together, we really can true the vote.

[Download our 2022 Year End Report](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=184ea9cb8e&e=ad8cba7e98)

Ever onward,
---
|
---
|
---
| [SUPPORT TRUE THE VOTE](https://truethevote.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d9ab56570d4ecf7b7df9d4c25&id=5358aff704&e=ad8cba7e98)
---
